Name: IRVINS
Description:
IRVINS is a high-growth homegrown consumer food brand expanding quickly on the global stage, with 5 offices and 12 markets worldwide, and a product lineup that redefines the food industry.

Founded in 2008, over the years we have pivoted and evolved from an F&B restaurant into a modern food CPG startup. With IRVINS’ global reach, category and market leadership, and startup mentality, we welcome people with a builder attitude keen on building things from scratch and help turn a homegrown brand into Singapore’s iconic global consumer brand.

Name: Food Industry Asia (FIA)
Description:
FIA was founded in July 2010 by a group of leading food and beverage companies. From our base in Singapore, we seek to enhance the industry’s role as a trusted partner in the development of science-based policy throughout the region.

FIA provides an important hub for advocacy and debate. We bring together the food industry’s most senior business leaders to champion initiatives that promote sustainable growth and support regional policies that deliver harmonised results.

Our members share common values on food safety, international competitiveness and the delivery of public health outcomes that are relevant to their products. Together, we lend support to local industry groups in the region and reach out to stakeholders who share our common vision.

At the heart of FIA’s philosophy lies a belief that the private sector can play a more positive role in civil society if it has a seat at the table. To this end, FIA is committed to building relationships with governments and policy makers – either directly or through existing local industry groups.

Name: JERA Global Markets
Description:
JERA Global Markets (JERAGM) is a leading utility-backed energy trader specialising in LNG, power, coal and freight. A joint venture between majority shareholder JERA Co., Inc. and EDF Trading, JERAGM’s shareholders are among the world’s major utilities. 

JERAGM operates one of the most exciting energy portfolios in the world which gives it an in-depth understanding of the way local, regional and international energy markets behave. These insights enable it to help its customers increase security of supply, optimise their portfolios and improve the risk management of their assets.

Headquartered in Singapore, JERAGM has a global talent pool of about 400 people across offices located in five strategic locations: Singapore, the UK (London), Japan (Tokyo), the US (Houston) and Australia (Brisbane). 

JERAGM is strongly capitalised with over US$500 million in paid up capital and a total equity of US$4 billion. JERAGM has been affirmed an AA- Stable credit rating from R&I (upgraded from A+ Stable in October 2024), attributable to a robust business model and solid financial base.

Name: HARIBO Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd.
Description: As the No. 1 fruit gum brand with more than 7,000 employees in 26 countries, we focus on top quality and the unique team spirit of the HARIBO Family. Practical experience, pleasure and job security make us a top employer. All over the world, our employees live their brand joy and drive HARIBO forward everyday. We have been supporting them since 1920 with trust, courage to pragmatism and focus. As part of the HARIBO Family, you benefit from freedom, responsibility and the opportunity to grow as a team with our global brand over the long term. Almost 100 years of experience and our very own success aromas enable you varied and challenging tasks. An international but still familiar working environment creates the perfect mix for a broad network and individual development. Become a valued member of the HARIBO Family - and get ready for a long-term career-path. Experience the success mix of practice and quality - let’s work together to make the world even more colorful!

Name: BSH Home Appliances ASEAN
Description:
We are home to both globally established Appliance Brands[1], such as Bosch, Siemens, and Gaggenau, as well as seven other equally exceptional brands, such as Neff and Thermador. With our Ecosystem Brand Home Connect and Service Brands such as Simply Yummy and BlueMovement, we offer consumers digital services and sustainable solutions to improve their daily lives.

Founded in 1967, BSH was established as a joint venture between Robert Bosch GmbH (Stuttgart) and Siemens AG (Munich). BSH has been under the sole ownership of Bosch Group since January 2015. 

In its over 50 years of history, BSH has grown from a German exporter into one of the world's leading home appliance manufacturers. 

[1] BSH is a Trademark Licensee of Robert Bosch GmbH and Siemens AG for the brands Bosch and Siemens.

Local BSH locations participate in global DEI programs to the extent compliant with local law.

Data Protection Information: https://www.bsh-group.com/data-protection-information
Our Netiquette: https://www.bsh-group.com/bsh-social-media-netiquette?fbclid=IwAR3W9AfRHl1c4UjRFSviX4YcR3J9EwtXXBoCB-XzXE7NZHfcUgnYYo9mgyU

Name: Mandom Corporation Singapore
Description:
Founded in 1927, Mandom Corporation Japan is a manufacturer and distributor of consumer products. To expand its global footprint, the company set its sights on countries such as Hong Kong, Thailand, Malaysia and Singapore.

From hair wax, cosmetics to shampoo, there is something for everyone to meet their daily needs. Some of the brands Mandom carries are: GATSBY, LUCIDO-L, Moist Diane and Heroine Make. 

Mandom Corporation prides itself as a human orientated company, with its key focus on Oyakudachi (dedication to service). The company is constantly seeking ways to improve consumers' lives with suitable products, which is made possible through years of research and development.

Name: PS.Gourmet Pte. Ltd.
Description:
PS.Cafe started from humble beginnings in 1999 as a cosy cafe hidden within Projectshop clothing store. This charming and understated spot quickly gained a following for its hearty takes on savoury cafe classics, famous truffle shoestring fries and indulgent cakes, puddings and tarts.

Today, the PS.Gourmet Group has 13 outlets in Singapore; 10 PS.Cafe outlets, the anglo-chinese concept Chopsuey Cafe and two contemporary Japanese restaurant Jypsy. The group also expanded internationally through its first overseas outpost in Shanghai in 2019 and now has three PS.Cafe sites in China.

Thoughtfully detailed interiors and lush surroundings, coupled with friendly relaxed service and generous portions, have made this homegrown Singapore brand an iconic and internationally recognised local favourite.

Visit www.pscafe.com to find out more!

Name: Foodsta Kitchens
Description:
Mission

Building food connections. All day, everyday.

 

About

Headquartered in Singapore, Foodsta Kitchens is a digital first restaurant company with operations in Singapore and India. We craft and operate food concepts through restaurants that satisfy your dine-in expectations as well as convenient deliveries that provide tasty meals at home or wherever you might be!

 

By being digital first, we embrace data, technology and automation to reinvent the way restaurants operate. This mindset is embedded in our brand identity, process and product innovation, and always with our customers’ expectations as our focus.  

 

With this philosophy, we’re able to then create the hottest and most savoured meals out of the best quality ingredients, while making sure our customers do not have to break the bank.

After all, we’re all foodies at heart.

Name: Country Foods
Description:
Our Purpose 
— Connect and Create a Better World through Food 

Our Vision
— To be a global leader that feeds and delights communities through integrated food solutions

Our Mission
— To deliver safe, affordable, quality and tasty food through innovation, sustainable efforts, partnerships and a resilient supply chain

Name: Tee Yih Jia Food Manufacturing Pte Ltd
Description:
Tee Yih Jia Food Manufacturing Pte Ltd is the leading frozen food manufacturer in Singapore, exporting more than 90% of its renowned Spring Home products to countries such as Europe, North America, South Africa, Middle East and Asia Pacific.  

Having achieved top spot in Singapore’s prestigious Enterprise 50 Awards in 2000, Tee Yih Jia’s flagship brand “Spring Home”, which won the Singapore Promising Brand Award amongst regional brands in 2007, is known the world over for its extensive range of frozen convenience food products such as spring roll pastry, roti paratha, Indian samosa, crepes, glutinous rice balls, and cocktail prawn rolls, just to name a few. Its brand portfolio has also expanded to other complementary brands such as “Happy Belly” and “Master Chef” targeted at specific niche markets.

As a Singapore International Company, Tee Yih Jia has world-class manufacturing facilities in Singapore, Malaysia, China and the United States, which hold international certifications of quality controls and hygiene such as HACCP and BRC.

Name: Barramundi Group
Description:
Our mission is to help close the world’s protein gap by championing barramundi as a high quality, sustainable source of protein endorsed by top chefs around the world while safe guarding the world’s oceans and environmental resources 

Founded in 2008, Barramundi Group Pte Ltd is the top 5 barramundi producers in the world. We own and operate our barramundi farms in Brunei and market our own registered brands of sustainable ocean-farmed Barramundi through the Kühlbarra and Cone Bay Barra brands that are currently in Australia, Singapore, US, China, Korea, Hong Kong etc.

Barramundi Group was listed on Euronext Growth Oslo on 12 August 2021. For more information, please visit Barramundi Group's listing page on the Euronext website: https://tinyurl.com/2kezn4z4

Name: White Lion Foods
Description:
Our purpose is simple, make humanity healthier, bring wealth to the communities we serve, and leave Earth in better shape than we found it.

White Lion Foods is a leading agritech group and one of Asia’s fastest-growing businesses, headquartered in Singapore with operations in Hong Kong, South Korea, Australia, USA, Brazil and Peru, we use technology to produce the highest quality nuts and garlic on the planet. We are one of the global leaders in the production and exportation of Peruvian Brazil Nuts, and the number 1 exporter of Andean purple garlic. We are delivering thousands of tones of product to 30 countries around the globe every year.

Name: A. Clouet (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.
Description:
A. Clouet (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. is a fully owned distribution company of Maison Denis (established 1862). In 1956, Maison Denis took over the company A.Clouet in Malaya with its main food activities: Ayam Brand. Ayam Brand became an international brand distributed in more than 30 countries on 3 continents and is today ranked among the top 500 consumer brands in Asia-Pacific.

Since 2004, Alce Nero and Maison Denis have formed a joint venture to promote and distribute Alce Nero organic products all over Asia. 

Maison Denis also distributes several other reputable brands from selected partners and recently launched yumeat (plant-based) in Singapore and the region.

Name: SunMoon Food Company Ltd
Description:
Started in 1983, SunMoon Food Company is a global distributor and marketer of quality and nutritious fresh fruits, vegetables, and fruit derivatives, delivered to the health-conscious consumer in the most convenient way. 
 
Since 2015, SunMoon has shifted towards an asset-light, consumer-centric and brand-focused business model by tapping on our strong brand equity and the Network x Geography x Product business model. To date, SunMoon now has over 15,000 point of sales serving over 100 million households around four continents, and over 300 products. 

SunMoon aspires to spread bite-size positivity and goodness to cosmopolitan consumers of the world through our dedication to creating quality, fresh and natural products. Together, we can create a healthier, sustainable earth with honest and nutritious foods.

Name: WhatIF Foods
Description: WhatIF Foods is a forward-thinking regenerative food and beverage company with a purpose to regenerate for future generations. With a steadfast commitment to building a regenerative economy, category-by-category innovation and achieving lifetime carbon zero in the process, WhatIF Foods is changing the way we think about food and its impact on our world. Guided by the founding principles of giving back more than we take away at every step of the value chain, WhatIF Foods envisions a future where delicious plant-based foods nurture our bodies, our soils, and our partner farming communities, ensuring a better world for future generations. Visit www.whatif-foods.com to learn more about our products, vision, and the impact we’re making.

Name: Nutrition Innovation - Transforming world health through sugar innovation.
Description:
Nutrition Innovation technology empowers global mills and refineries to produce raw low GI sugar (at industrial scale) as a replacement or reduction strategy for white refined sugar in the world's food and beverage brands.

This innovation unleashes the development of better, healthier food & beverage products.

We create partnerships in the battle to combat the global obesity & diabetes epidemic through research, development and the adoption of low GI sugar replacement and reduction in consumer products.

Providing a solution to governments, producers, industry, manufacturers and consumers – from farm to plate.

Nutrition Innovation has been awarded Top 10 Start-up by FI Europe 2017, Best new ingredient by the World Food Awards and the Asia Food Innovation Awards 2019, Global Agri-Food Tech Winner by Slingshot 2019, One of Singapore’s Top 20 Start-ups 2019, part of the Global FoodTech 500 in 2019, 2020 and 2021, named as one of the Best Small Business in the world driving food change by the United Nations in 2021 and been awarded having breakthroughs in immunity at Future Food Tech 2022 and the World Food Forum Start-Up Awards 2022.

Let's make the world a healthier place.

For more information contact: 

Matthew Godfrey. CEO
matthew@nutritioninnovationgroup.com
https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthew-godfreyceo/

Name: Growthwell Foods
Description:
Growthwell Foods, a Temasek backed food-tech startup, is Asia’s leading plant-based nutrition company. Growthwell Foods develops plant- based brands like HAPPIEE! currently available in leading supermarket chains in Singapore such as Cold Storage, NTUC FairPrice, Prime Supermarket, and RedMart.

Working towards its vision of harnessing the power of plants to nourish a billion lives, the company continues to invest in plant-based research and development, driving innovation for its valued partners and consumers globally.

By infusing food cultures with plant-based innovation, Growthwell contributes to a healthier, more sustainable food system that respects the body, local culinary traditions, and the planet.

Name: Shandi
Description:
Founded in 2020 and headquartered in Singapore, Shandi Global emerged with a mission to address the growing challenges in the global food system.

We provide game-changing solutions for businesses, brands and most importantly for the Planet with our animal free Protein innovations ,which require significantly less land , water and greenhouse gas emissions. 

Shandi Global protein stands out as a breakthrough in nutrition and taste. Engineered using a proprietary 5-patent process, these proteins are clean, natural, and free from artificial additives. 
Key benefits include:
• Superior Digestibility 
• Complete Nutrition ( Select best and complete amino acid profile )
• Exceptional Taste and Texture 
• Zero Cholesterol & Clean Ingredients

By leveraging Shandi's versatile proteins, businesses can develop creative food products that redefine junk food categories, delivering protein-rich alternatives from bars , beverages , bakery, alternative meat and novel food and beverages that benefit from a Protein boost. One standout innovation is Forever by Shandi, the flagship brand offering plant-based chicken products rivaling animal-based counterparts in taste, texture, and nutritional value.
With a global presence, Shandi Global partners with businesses to bridge the nutritional gap by improving food distribution networks , increasing awareness about healthy eating. and making nutritious food more accessible to underserved communities , along the way promoting  sustainability and nature based innovative products for a healthier future.

Spearheading this transformation are our Co-founders Dr. Reena and Dr. Gaurav Sharma. They bring unparalleled expertise and a shared passion for health, sustainability, and impactful solutions.

Let us work together towards a world, where good nutrition is available to all and secure food safety to feed the future population.

Name: Aalst Chocolate
Description:
Aalst Chocolate operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Singapore that produces industrial chocolate products using the highest quality raw materials from West Africa, South America and Asia. Using the latest European technologies, our experienced technical team is able to deliver premium chocolate ingredients for the Confectionery, Bakery, Food Service and Consumer industries.

With an exceptional and profound understanding of chocolate, our team of specialist is able to provide technical support in the use and application of our products. 

Aalst Chocolate currently exports to more than 50 countries.

Name: Sasha's Fine Foods
Description: As one of Singapore's first and best online fine food companies, Sasha's Fine Foods has become the port-of-call for food lovers in Singapore who value products chosen for their impeccable provenance.  We work only with suppliers around the world who adopt the highest possible standards in animal welfare, traceability and sustainability.

Name: Roechling Industrial (Singapore) Pte Ltd
Description: Röchling is a family-owned, medium-sized corporate group that specializes in processing engineering plastics. We are one of the global leaders in this field. In the capital goods sector, automotive industry, and medical and pharmaceutical technology providers – our innovative products are trusted by many customers. And yet, our aim is always the same: We see what our customers need and provide them with the solutions they seek. Röchling stands for competence in plastics.

Name: Sia Huat Pte Ltd
Description:
Agent, Direct Distributor and Stockist

Sia Huat is Southeast Asia’s leading agent and direct distributor for an extensive range of foodservice products and equipment with over 38,000 SKUs of products and 120 brands. Our ERP-enabled warehousing facilities in Singapore ensure stocks are properly stored and monitored for ease of future replenishments. As the partner of choice, we strive to deliver beyond food service supplies to fit every budget and need.

Sia Huat focuses on long-term relationships with our various partners in the food service industry. These include restaurants, hotels, airlines, hospitals, and educational institutions. We also work closely with our trade and wholesale customers, including resellers, and all major departmental stores.

Today, Sia Huat exports to more than 13 countries in Southeast Asia and around the world. Our team of over 200 employees within Singapore, with representative offices in China, Malaysia and Indonesia, takes care of our worldwide customers to ensure their orders are delivered on time and in a complete manner. 

In 2010, Sia Huat launched ToTT Store, a specialty experiential retail concept that curates Tools of The Trade to inspire cooking, baking and hosting in Singapore. Visit www.tottstore.com for details and locations, or shop.tottstore.com to browse.

Name: Kim Hock Corporation Pte Ltd
Description: Kim Hock Corporation Pte Ltd is a leading Singapore SME specializing in metal scrap recycling. We also recycle horticultural and wood waste through our in-house waste-to-energy plant. With our own fleet of vessels and vehicles, we offer integrated marine logistics, enabling direct shipments to ASEAN buyers via tug and barge.

Name: Vega Foods Ltd
Description: Vega Foods Pte Ltd is a start-up player in the foods segment and is aggressively pursuing a brand building strategy in each product category for creating sustainable advantage. Vega operates in 30 countries across the globe with significant operations in Africa. Vega is an established leader basis its differentiators: Quality, Convenience & Market penetration for its customer/consumer base and Entrepreneurial approach, Empowerment & Value driven culture for its employees.

Name: SGProtein
Description: We are SGProtein. A Singapore-based contract manufacturing platform for meat analogues, aka plant-based meat. Or fish. Or seafood. If you are planning on producing or distributing your own plant-based product, and you don’t want to invest in the infrastructure, we are your trusted production partner, helping you to scale your plant-based meat alternative business asset light.

Name: Hela Spice Singapore Pte Ltd
Description:
Hela Gewürzwerk Hermann Laue started in 1905 by Hermann Laue as a casings and spice business in the heart of Hamburg. For more than a 100 years, Hermann Laue has developed extensive experience in processing raw spices, developing seasoning blends, meat processing agents, kitchen aids and retail products.
 
Hermann Laue (Pte) Ltd, Singapore was established in 1980, as a wholly owned company of Hela Gewürzwerk Hermann Laue GmbH & Co.  The company was  later renamed to Hela Spice Singapore Pte Ltd on 31 March 2010, in a move to establishing and standardizing the names of all Global Hela companies.
 
Being the regional hub for Asia, Hela Spice Singapore oversees Malaysia, Indonesia, Brunei, Thailand, Philippines, Laos, Cambodia, Vietnam, Myanmar, Hong Kong SAR, Taiwan, Korea, India, Sri Lanka, Bangladesh and Pakistan. We have our own logistics team in Singapore. The rest of the region is serviced by our appointed in-country partners. We service the hotels, restaurants and other catering establishments – large and small, flight kitchens, food manufacturers, meat-processing plants, supermarkets, hospitals, clubs, bakeries/delis and schools.

Name: Phoon Huat
Description:
Founded in 1947 and headquartered in Singapore, Phoon Huat is a leading manufacturer of quality bakery ingredients, tools and services for the retail and foodservice markets as well as artisan and industrial bakeries. We connect ingredients and expertise to help ensure the only limits to what a baker can achieve are their imagination.

Underpinned by our global network of strategic supplier partners, we ensure the availability of specialized ingredients and distribute known global trusted brands in complement to our own category leading brands; RedMan, Gold Tree, Bakeway and Wise Choice to help our customers across Asia Pacific, the Middle East and Africa grow their businesses and delight their customers. 

Phoon Huat is a IHRP (Institute for Human Resource Professionals) Corporate Partner.

Name: Thong Siek Global
Description:
It all started with a dream, a passion for fishball, and a leap of faith.

Thong Siek Global began humbly as a family-run backyard operation in 1976. Over the years, we have evolved in our international quest to delight taste buds around the world, offering the finest surimi-based seafood products today.

We have been awarded multiple accolades and certifications, notably the highest-grade AA in the BRC Global Standard for Food Safety in 2020, SFA Food Safety Grade A Gold Award for the past two decades, and Halal Certification for seafood products by the Muslim Religious Council of Singapore (MUIS).

Balancing innovation and tradition, our commitment to be best-in-class and surpass industry benchmarks has positioned us globally as a leading manufacturer, distributor, and retailer of surimi-based seafood products. 

Here at Thong Siek Global, we strongly believe in building an inclusive people-oriented workforce. Our dedicated participation to the President’s Challenge Enabling Employment Pledge has shown us a gainful employment of Persons With Disabilities thus far.

Visit https://thongsiek.com to learn more. 

Interested in working with us? Drop us a message or email us at enquiry@thongsiek.com.

Name: Saveraa International Private Limited
Description: Saveraa International is a brokerage firm dealing in edible oil, palm oil as well as a list of vegetable oil products and derivatives. Our team of highly professional brokers tap the top markets of India, Malaysia, Indonesia, Singapore, Dubai, Pakistan, Myanmar and Bangladesh to cater to the supply and demand needs across the retail and corporate segments. We offer customized solutions to our clientele based on our rich experience and market insights from the industry to capitalize the trading opportunities in complex world of commodities.

Name: NP GROUP
Description:
N.P. Foods (Singapore) Pte Ltd was founded in 1987 as an emerging seasoning manufacturing business, with operations covering Malaysia and Indonesia. Today, N.P. Foods has grown to become one of the most renowned seasoning manufacturing companies across Southeast Asia and has successfully expanded our business globally, penetrating overseas markets such as the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific region.

At N.P. Foods, we take pride in our expertise in seasoning manufacturing, as well as our vast global network, which enables us to gain a competitive advantage over our competitors in the industry. We customize and produce seasonings tailored to each overseas market.

N.P. Foods understands the utmost importance of food safety and quality. In recent years, we have achieved esteemed certifications and recognitions such as SQF and FSSC 22000, cementing our position as a leading pioneer in the industry. Moreover, we are proud to have received the prestigious Platinum Award from the Singapore Food Agency (SFA) in recognition of our efforts to maintain high hygiene standards. 

Our Products
Snack Pellet Line - Steam Cooking, Snack Pellet Line - Extrusion, Choco Absorption Snack Line, Pop Chip Snack Line, Flavouring System, Puff Gun Line, Cereal Snack Bar Mfg. Line, Roasted / Fried Peanut Line.

Name: KH Roberts
Description: At KH Roberts, we craft future flavours that bring delight and imagination to the world. As one of Asia’s leading creators of aromas and tastes, we are constantly pushing the boundaries, always discovering, always innovating. With world-class research, innovation, and manufacturing capabilities, supported by a keen understanding of Asia’s diverse cultures, tastes and preferences, we bring to our customers crafted flavours that are novel, relevant, and delightful. For more than 50 years, we have established an extensive network of clients and partners. They range from private labels to multinational consumer companies, serving diverse segments from Foods & Beverages, Health & Wellness to Pharmaceuticals. Headquartered in Singapore with local operating presence across Asia, we serve and support the needs of our customers around the world.

Name: AFFIA: ASIAN FOOD  & FEED INSECT ASSOCIATION
Description:
The Asian Food and Feed Insect Association (AFFIA) is a group of companies, institutions and experts, which promotes and supports the use of insects as food and as feed.

AFFIA aims to bring industry and research stakeholders from the insect sectors in a collaborative movement towards the development of entomoculture, entomophagy and their related activities.

Name: Float Foods
Description:
We are dedicated to making the world a better, healthier place. Sounds cheesy, but it's true.

Let's start with the environment. We realise that we are part of the problem. So we want to change things. 

1. We are going to work hard to bring about change in our environment by transforming how we eat and what we eat. We don't want animals to suffer at our expense, and we don't want to harm the planet.  

2. We also want to live healthy and clean. We want to build up our local capabilities by offering tasty nutrient-dense plant based foods, by leveraging food tech and innovation.

3. We want our supply chains to be within our borders. We can do this by investing in local production so that we can make a substantive impact on our food supply and security. 

We want a new future of food, today.

Job opportunities: https://www.floatfoods.com/copy-of-press

Name: Prima Taste
Description: A division of Prima Food, Prima Taste, the Group’s flagship B2C brand, was launched in 1998. It was the culmination of the Group’s passion to preserve the heritage and tradition of Singapore food, and to offer authentic, easy to make Singapore cuisine to the world, without compromise. Today, Prima Taste offers a wide range of gourmet Singapore dishes through its Best Singapore Favourites meal sauce kits, Authentic Asia cooking sauces and pastes, LaMians and Ready Meals. Prima Taste products are widely distributed to major supermarkets and online stores in more than 40 markets, and its LaMians have been consistently crowned the top “Instant Noodle of All Time” by The Ramen Rater since 2013.

Name: Lee Wee & Brothers
Description:
A local household brand synonymous with quality otah, Lee Wee & Brothers takes pride in a family-run business philosophy that emphasises traditional recipes and methods. Having been around for two decades, the homegrown chain earns a reputation for delivering the most original, authentic and sophisticated taste of Singapore – the taste of the good ol’ days.

Food has always been their chief passion. And passion indeed is the chief ingredient, above all their spices. All the recipes come from the Lee Family’s rich heritage and combined with the freshest ingredients to create its own unique Singaporean flavour.

Name: FoodPlant Pte Ltd
Description:
Singapore’s first shared facility for small-batch food production, FoodPlant, promotes and facilitates innovation within the local food manufacturing industry by providing affordable access to a wide range of pilot scale equipment. It also provides opportunities for collaboration amongst local food companies, as well as deep skills training for industry-ready food technologists, to strengthen and develop the industry’s adoption of advanced and cutting-edge food processing technologies.

Jointly established by the Singapore Institute of Technology, Enterprise Singapore and JTC, FoodPlant is anticipated to be ready in 2022. The facility will be located at JTC Food Hub @ Senoko.

Name: Enerfo
Description:
Enerfo, established in 2010, has forged out a desire to provide value-added solutions in order to foster international trade. From humble beginnings, we have grown into a global trading company headquartered in Singapore. Today, we are a key player in supplying complete trade solutions from procurement, shipping, logistics and financing to the downstream distribution of various agricultural and energy commodities.

With operations across a multitude of countries and the ability to extract desirable results from the value chain, we have performed optimally to breakdown international trade barriers. The combination of a highly-experienced team and significant commercial activities between the West and Asia has allowed us to develop a solid platform, centered on strong logistics, structured financing and sound risk management skills. We continuously strive to secure high-quality products in our networks, create the best-in-class cost efficiency and meet our clients’ requirements.

Name: 67 Pall Mall Singapore
Description: The private Members' Club by wine lovers, for wine lovers.

Name: Polar Puffs & Cakes
Description:
Established back in 1926, our very first outlet was located on 51 High Street was well-loved for our signature Curry Puffs as well as a selection of ice-cream and chilled refreshments.

Polar Café was the go-to place for politicians, lawyers and businessmen due to its strategic location near the trading harbor. Amongst these prolific consumers, Lim Bo Seng, one of Singapore’s prominent businessman, would often patronize the Polar Café back in the days.

Having witnessed and endured the difficult period of World War II together with Singapore, we have progressed in tandem with the country. In December 1986, we opened our 2nd outlet and subsequently expanded rapidly into every heartland and soon became a staple to many.

With over 100 varieties of pastries, cakes and other confectioneries, we take pride in selecting the finest ingredients to produce handmade quality pastries that are baked fresh daily.

Name: Ferco Shutters & Seating Systems
Description:
Ferco Shutters is an international manufacturer and distributor of a range of doors and shutters for fire and smoke, industrial and commercial use. Over 30 years, we have grown to develop regional operations out of Dubai and Singapore. Today our engineers and consultants are able to provide valuable assistance from creating design solutions at the conception of the project to installation and best in class after sales service. 

Ferco (Seating) specializes in the design and manufacture of auditorium, cinema, home theatre, education and stadium seating. European design with Asian manufacturing ensures cost-effective, top quality products for customers. With a network of agents in Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia and the Pacific Rim, we've installed over 1,000,000 seats in over 32 countries in 30 years.

Name: Mycovation
Description: Mycovation is Asia's first mycelium protein company building a portfolio of food ingredients that are vegan, nutritious, affordable and sustainable.

Name: Tai Sun (Lim Kee) Food Industries Pte Ltd
Description: Singapore-based Tai Sun (Food Industries) is a high-growth innovative packaged food company specializing in producing tasty and quality snack food. Established in 1966, what initially started out as a modest family business has since expanded and grown throughout the years.

Name: RelSus
Description:
Relsus is a FoodTech start-up with a vision to help people live "Healthy Lives on a Healthier Planet". Relsus is on a mission to innovate and produce at scale, high quality, sustainably produced, natural & healthy food ingredients to empower people to live healthy life while at the same time contributing towards improving the health of our planet.

Relsus has developed a range of high-quality plant-based proteins from natural sources: Chickpea, Mung bean, Pea and Rapeseed. In order to ensure quality, transparency, sustainability and reliability of supply chains, Relsus has adopted an integrated approach from Farming to Product development to Production of Plant-based Protein Isolates and Concentrates. We prefer relying on our own or partner agricultural farms using organic farming practices for raw materials, self-developed production process used in our own state of the art production facility to ensure high quality product produced in a highly sustainable manner. We want to be the preferred supply partner for deserving food and beverage companies.

“Relsus” stands for Reliability (Rel) & Sustainability (Sus), both of which are central to the DNA of Relsus. We refer Reliability & Sustainability with wider definition to include corporate responsibility towards all stakeholders including the society, employees, planet, suppliers, and customers. We believe that an honest, transparent, and people & planet respecting culture is key to long term success of any company.

Relsus was founded by a highly qualified team having over 120 years of combined experience at senior positions in leading multinational companies in the field of Nutritional ingredients, Pharma API with extensive experience on fermentation, enzymatic & chemical processes as well as branding, marketing & selling products in global markets, corporate governance and people leadership.

Relsus is headquartered in Singapore and has farming, research & development and manufacturing operations in India.

Name: Timbre Group
Description:
Timbre Group, a renowned lifestyle brand with an impressive 18-year legacy in Singapore, has evolved from a humble restaurant and bar into a multifaceted organisation spanning F&B, Place Making and Management, Events and Entertainment. Originally founded to provide a platform for local artists and musicians, Timbre Group is now a key player in Singapore's cultural scene. The group remains committed to preserving the rich hawker culture, supporting local musicians through platforms like the Timbre Music Academy, and innovating the F&B industry with cutting-edge technology. Name: WowFactories
Description:
What started as a master's thesis over a year ago, exploring the question—“Can we make products truly sustainable?”, has now grown into a mission to radically revolutionize how we design, create, and own tools. At the heart of this mission lies our commitment to combining innovation with sustainability, empowering makers everywhere to embrace the Right to Repair and reimagine their ownership of products.

As a power tools manufacturer, our philosophy is rooted in circularity—tools that are built to last, repairable, reusable, and re-imaginable. Our approach embraces Reparative Design and Material Banking to create a sustainable legacy for future generations. 

Our vision is simple: you should never have to pay AGAIN for the materials of the product you’ve already paid for. We want to give MAKERS complete control over their TOOLS. Every product you buy should remain yours—it's materials, it's value, it's potential. Owning a product SHOULD mean owning its future—where a broken product isn’t the end of its story but the start of something new.

Name: JP Pepperdine Group
Description:
We spice up your dining experience!
 
In the food service industry, every little gesture counts. Diners know it when a food establishment is out to wow them. They can taste it in the food, feel it through the service, and see it from the way the restaurant is set up.

This special experience is what diners have come to link with our group of restaurants that started with the popular Jack’s Place Steakhouse in 1966, then evolved to Eatzi Gourmet, Restaurant Hoshigaoka, Jumping Jack and Jack's Place.

What inspired us to create this unique experience for our guests? Interestingly, it is a lesson that we take from the kitchen itself. Drawing on the admirable qualities of pepper, we aspire to spice up the dining experience in all ways, big and small. In big ways, we will be adventurous, sizzling up the F&B scene with fresh concepts and food creations. In small ways, we dedicate ourselves to delight our patrons through our food, service and atmosphere. Which is why, we are now the JP Pepperdine Group, named after that extraordinary spice itself.

In all that we do, quality and value will always be our benchmarks. It is our hope that our guests take home with them a lingering fondness, and the knowledge that for the price they pay, they really have much more in return.

Name: VIT8 PTE. LTD
Description:
Vit8 is a wholesaler and importer of frozen tropical fruit pulps and has been incorporated in Singapore since 2011.
Fruits are processed into frozen fruit pulp shortly after harvest so as to maintain the freshness and quality of the ripe fruit.
Vit8 implements the highest standard of quality control to ensure the top quality of final products. Quality control methods at the Vit8 frozen pulp factory includes:
Powered freezing tunnels to better preserve nutritional and the sensory qualities of the pulp
Equipment to heat pulp and reduce its air content in order to minimize the enzymatic degradation of the pulp.
Top-quality automatic processing and pasteurization unit, designed and built in Italy.
Opportunity to process in the factory some of the fruit varieties cultivated in the adjacent fruit plantation.
It is made of 100% handpicked Brazilian fresh fruits which are processed at the optimal stage of ripeness according to an accurate production process which involves weighing the ripened fruits individually.
No sugar, preservatives or colouring are added to maintain the exceptional nutritional qualities of Brazilian fresh fruits.
Vit8 is collaborating with several cafes to provide Açai, Açerola and Graviola (Soursop) for a new range of smoothies available.
Vit8 frozen tropical fruit pulps are ideal to prepare excellent juices, smoothies, sorbets and yoghurts.
Full range of products by Vit8 includes:
Açai
Açerola
Cajá
Caju (Cashew)
Goiaba (Guava)
Graviola (Soursop)
Mango

Description:
Tai Wah started as a partnership in 1956 with offices in Singapore, Malaysia and Hongkong. Major brands marketed and distributed previously by Tai Wah includes Wella, Ella Bache, Sothys, Nemectron, Takara and 4711.

In 1985, Tai Wah entered into joint ventures with Wella AG in a manufacturing plant in Malaysia and distribution companies in Singapore, Malaysia and Hongkong. Tai Wah has since divested all its interests in these joint ventures.

Over the years, Tai Wah has developed an extensive professional (hair and beauty salon) distribution network in South East Asia and China. It currently markets and distributes these brands – Kadus, Depileve/Anesi, Payot, Wahl.

Tai Wah entered the Chinese market in the late 1990s and today has interests in manufacturing facilities in China – manufacturing hair equipment like hairdryers, hair irons, and machines for hair and beauty salons. It has developed its own range of hair and beauty equipment, machine and accessories under the Tuft trademark. At the same time it also markets and sell the OEM services of these factories in China.

Tai Wah today has taken a more global view of its business interests and currently services a wide customer base from all over the world in the sale of the products from its manufacturing facilities in China. In addition it is promoting and marketing its own brand of hair and beauty equipment and machines under the Tuft label.

Tai Wah also provides sourcing services to foreign companies interested in selling product to or buying products from China. Foreign companies requiring such services will find Tai Wah’s ability to render effective and reliable communication services and its reputation for honesty and ethical practices together with its fully operational office/showroom in China attractive and suitable to the needs.

Name: Universal Blanchers-Seabrook ingredients/An Olam Group Company
Description:
The company focuses its resources on supplying ingredients and services to the peanut industry. 
We are committed to investing in the people and technology required to provide high quality peanut products and services to our customers. This commitment is your guarantee. 
We are confident that our program of continuous upgrades in technology, equipment and people will result in reduced consumer complaints and ultimately increased sales for our customers.

History

Universal Blanchers was founded in 1978 with the opening of the first peanut processing plant in Blakely, Georgia. A second facility servicing the Southwest US market was opened in Dublin, Texas in 1990.


In October 1999 the company was purchased by the current owners, Universal Blanchers LLC. Since that time, the business has grown to include five peanut processing plants with key facilities in every major US peanut growing region. These facilities include a low cost peanut dry roasting facility in Dublin, Texas, a state of the art raw peanut cleaning operation in Blakely, Georgia, and a full roasting and peanut butter ingredient plant in Edenton, North Carolina.

Whether you’re enjoying a quiet meal with family, sealing a business deal with executives, hanging out with friends, or simply having some alone time – SEOUL YUMMY is the place to be.

We just want you to have a great and unforgettable experience with us.

We currently have two outlets: Keong Saik which features a day-to-night concept, where we’ve identified drastically different crowds for these two times of day; and Hillview which features an asian-fusion concept.

As a coffee-centric establishment, we source and roast all of our coffee beans in-house. We pride ourselves in our ability to control a large portion of the whole coffee making process. 

We partner with multiple farmers, especially from Indonesia, which we believe is still a relatively undiscovered area for gourmet coffee. With its plethora of volcanoes, comes areas that are nutrient dense and great for coffee farming.

As for our food menu, we curate items to compliment both the coffee, as well as the location of our outlets. Hence, you'll definitely be able to find and try something new at each of our outlets.

Founded in 2013, Gourmet Supplies is a Singapore-based beverage company specializing in production, distribution, and food innovation. We bring together heritage and modernity through a diverse portfolio of beverage solutions tailored for today’s fast-paced lifestyle and global palates.

As one of Singapore’s leading fresh-brew RTD (ready-to-drink) beverage providers, we proudly own and develop 8 premium in-house brands, offering healthier, flavour-forward drinks inspired by Asian and fusion profiles. From milk teas to herbal brews, our beverages are crafted with quality ingredients and a commitment to freshness.

Our 4 core capabilities include:
·  Beverage Manufacturing – F&B solutions tailored to OEM needs with full customization and low MOQ.
· Distribution & Supply – A robust network servicing local HORECA, convenience chains, and retailers with both proprietary and third-party brands.
· Smart Vending – Innovative vending technology to support 24/7 sales, sampling, and engagement.
· Food & Beverage Concepting – From R&D to café formats, we turn culinary ideas into impactful consumer experiences.

We are actively expanding into export markets, working closely with overseas supermarket chains, lifestyle retailers, and hospitality groups to introduce the taste of Asia to the world.

Looking to collaborate on private label or OEM beverage projects? Let’s build something refreshing together.

 HQ & Warehouse: 16 Senoko Crescent, Singapore
 www.gourmetsupplies.com.sg

Our Brands:

Name: HUAY FENG HANG PTE LTD (HUIJI)
Description:
Huay Feng Hang Pte Ltd was established in 1988 and started out as an importer/exporter, distributor and wholesaler of medical and health products. Over the past decades, the company has grown exponentially to become a trusted brand representing a stellar range of medical and health products sold globally today. We have more than 25 years of experience specializing in producing and marketing innovative Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) products.

Our constant strives for quality has resulted in significant market penetration into all leading supermarkets, major pharmacies and medical halls. As a mark of our organization’s excellence, we have been awarded the ISO 9001 certification. The implementation of the ISO 9001 quality control system has further inspired us to produce an unrivalled diversity of products so we can meet the needs of our customers in their pursuit of good health.

One of our bestsellers are Huiji Waist Tonic – the leading No.1 brand for Waist Tonic in Singapore (having won the Unity Popular Choice Award – TCM Supplement consecutively for six years from 2009 – 2015). Our waist tonic is made of 100% premium natural herbs including Cordyceps, Ginseng, Du Zhong, Dang Gui, Shou Wu and Da Zao. This unique formula helps to combat rheumatism, overcome fatigue, nourish vital energy and is especially beneficial for those who experiences lower back pain and backache. It does not contain alcohol and added sugar, thus suitable to be consumed during confinement.

To further enhance and control the quality assurance of our Huiji Waist Tonic, we shifted our production unit to Singapore and even received recognition as a GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices) Certified Factory by Health Sciences Authority (HSA) – an enduring symbol of our stringent quality control.

We also offer exotic ingredients like Pang Da Hai (Malva Nut), Basil Seeds (Frog Eggs), Aloe Vera and Tamarind Juice.

Top Gourmet’s products are certified Halal. We have been awarded with the ISO 9001 Quality Assurance Certification, as well as the HACCP International Certification for food safety management systems.

Our products are sold locally in Supermarkets, Minimarts, Convenient Stores, Restaurants, Caterers, Cafes, Petrol Station Minimarts, etc. Regionally, we now have a presence in Western Australia and Auckland, New Zealand. Name: Roots of Quality Foods
Description:
Roots of Quality Foods logo
Co-founder & CEOCo-founder & CEO
Roots of Quality Foods · Full-timeRoots of Quality Foods · Full-time
Jul 2020 - Present · 1 yr 8 mosJul 2020 - Present · 1 yr 8 mos
Singapore, TaiwanSingapore, Taiwan
Healthy for You, Healthier for the Planet! Roots' plant-based foods deliver health, convenience, and sustainability with good flavour! 

For us, food is not just a simple necessity. It tells a story, embodies the joy and happiness of sharing, strengthens social and family ties, and passes on traditions. More importantly, a healthy diet can make life better. Apricot Kernel Drink is a perfect example of this, and is the origin of how we started Roots of Quality Foods.

The idea for our first product, Apricot Kernel Drink, actually came from my mother. There was a time when apricot kernel drink was people's favourite in Taiwan. It tastes creamy and smooth and has an elegant and charming aroma. Taiwanese people enjoyed drinking it all year round, cold in summer and warm in winter. To allow our family to enjoy the exceptional taste from the old days, my mother would get up early in the morning, grind the apricot kernels with a stone mill, add water and sugar, and simmer it into a delicious drink. For our family, this is the taste of a nutritious breakfast and happiness.

In order to make plant-based milks that people in Taiwan, and even the world, will find it delicious and love it, we envision to develop products that are healthy, tasty, convenient, and sustainable.

We hope we can work together to create more fun and quality in our lives. So, please join us to make Roots of Quality Foods warm and interesting. Let's make the world a better place!

Family Plan

Description:
Giorgio Food Asia was founded with the vision of revolutionising the baking industry in Asia by providing top-tier baking ingredients and solutions. The founders recognized a gap in the market for premium-quality baking products catering to both professional chefs and home bakers.

Vision: To become the cornerstone of every baker's masterpiece, empowering creativity and elevating baking experiences worldwide.

An Italian Brand [Dolciaria Acquaviva] of Frozen Dough (Ready-to-Bake) and Frozen Desserts (Thaw-and-Serve) was brought in to serve as a transformative solution for kitchens. This wasn’t merely about introducing a product; it was a strategic move to offer a cost-effective, time-saving solution that upheld the uncompromising quality synonymous with authentic Italian baking.

For the Artisan Bakers, Giorgio Food Aisa has also curated the finest Baking Ingredients such as [Bongiovanni] Italian Flour tailored for specific products and Innovative Baking Solutions like [Biocreations] Sourdough Concentrate that replaces the need for a starter), empowering bakers of all levels to achieve exceptional results in their creations. 

Giorgio Food Asia is also at the forefront of addressing industry trends like the demand for Clean Label products, offering 100% natural shelf-life extension solutions and a spectrum of chemical-free baking solutions for manufacturers and industrial bakers.

Name: LOCABA Bakery Singapore
Description:
It all started in Europe: In 2012 Austrian-born Markus Berndt was diagnosed with diabetes Type 2. The former manager changed his entire lifestyle and embarked on a long quest of research, expert discussions and self-experiments. And it paid off: Today Markus is considered as “cured” (without ever having taken insulin), is a bestselling author and with his lectures and seminars he has led hundreds of interested Type 2 diabetics out of their lifestyle dead end.
His mission included – against all odds – good food. Markus was convinced that it’s possible to rebuild dishes so that they taste great AND are optimized for the human metabolism. For six years Markus experimented with hundreds of ingredients and thousands of combinations, always checking their effect on his blood sugar level. Throughout this process he collected an enormous amount of data and a unique know-how. A know-how that has materialized in delicious treats that are available in Singapore since March 2019.
From Austria To Singapore
The renowned Singaporean hospitality group, Ponte Group, discovered the treasure of Markus’ recipes and know-how. In a co-operation between Markus and local chefs a portfolio of cakes and desserts has been created that all have the signature LOCABA qualities: All cakes are low-carb, (household) sugar free, diabetic-friendly and as they are totally grain free they are also free from gluten containing ingredients.
LOCABA uses cage-free eggs and strictly no artificial preservatives. The latter is the reason why there are not products in stock at the bakery. All cakes are freshly baked to order.
Customers appreciate this high-quality approach. The cakes range from 45 SGD to 135 SGD (serve up to 14 persons).
LOCABA’s low-carb cakes are also suitable for keto or paleo nutrition and they are far from being recommendable for diabetics only. As they are good for your figure and your teeth, LOCABA cakes are perfect for healthy conscious foodies and for kids!

Native Potato Starch: High-quality potato starch, ideal for use in the food industry, with applications ranging from thickening agent to stabilizer in various food products.

Food Additives: A wide range of additives, including emulsifiers, stabilizers, and preservatives, that enhance the texture, shelf life, and quality of food products.

Feed Additives: Additives for animal feed, such as enzymes, amino acids, and probiotics, which enhance the nutritional value of livestock feed and improve feed conversion efficiency.

Specialty Ingredients: Unique and tailored ingredients for specific applications in the food industry, such as gluten replacements and fiber-enriched products.

Our delicious pizzas are available for dine in, take away and delivery and feature items such as Sopra - tomato sauce, mozzarella, Parma ham, fresh tomato, arugula and Parmesan Arrabbiata - tomato sauce, mozzarella, bacon, mushroom, onion and chilli oil  and Krakatoa tomato sauce, mozzarella, grilled chicken, mushroom, dried chilli and garlic oil.

Sopra is also a great venue to host events with a variety of seating options available and food and beverage packages that can be tailored to your needs whether it is for a small informal gathering or corporate events for upwards of 250 guests

Name: Merchant Brothers
Description:
Merchant Brothers Pte Ltd, established in Singapore in April 2020 by José Rodrigues and Ray Poh, is a distinguished trading company specialising in fine food products from Portugal and various parts of the world. In collaboration with the Rodrigues family, who operates Sabores Alentejanos, a renowned Macau distributor of foodstuff throughout Macau, Hong Kong, and China, Merchant Brothers has successfully carved a niche in delivering exceptional culinary experiences.

José Rodrigues, driven by his profound love for Portuguese culture and tradition, embarked on this venture to address the scarcity of authentic Portuguese food products in the Asian region. His extensive knowledge and passion for nature and agriculture prompted frequent visits to his family's hometown in the rustic Alentejo region of Portugal and Europe. Recognising that the foundation of excellent cuisine lies in the use of quality ingredients, José curated and individually sourced products, elevating Sabores Alentejanos to one of the premier food suppliers in Macau.

Merchant Brothers, inspired by this culinary journey, aspires to take the Singaporean palate on an extraordinary voyage to explore the flavours of Portugal and beyond. Since November 2023, we have increased our product portfolio to include a wider array of seafood and fine meats, enhancing our commitment to providing diverse and high-quality food options to our valued customers. This expansion aligns with our vision to bring a rich tapestry of flavours, rooted in European culinary traditions, to the vibrant culinary scene of Singapore. As we grow, our dedication to sourcing the finest products remains unwavering, ensuring that every experience with Merchant Brothers is a delightful celebration of exquisite taste and cultural richness.

Description:
Tired of the weight loss battle? Do you wish you could shed pounds without
sacrificing the delicious local flavours you love?
For too long, losing weight has felt like a choice between bland, unsatisfying meals or giving up altogether. Many diets promise results but deliver slowly, leaving you discouraged, while others might work faster but come with hidden health risks or force you to abandon your favourite foods.

That's where HealthFull Meals changes the story.

We believe weight loss shouldn't feel like a punishment. Born from decades of nutritional expertise and a deep understanding of both science and flavour, HealthFull Meals offers a revolutionary approach: real, delicious food that helps you achieve real, sustainable results.
Imagine enjoying satisfying portions of Char Kway Teow, Briyani with Tandoori Chicken, or a hearty Cottage Pie, all while confidently knowing you're on track to lose 3-5 kg a month.

It's not Magic; it's Science.

Each HealthFull meal is thoughtfully crafted based on a clinically tested "healthy keto" principle – designed for rapid weight loss without compromising your heart health. Our meals are low in carbs but rich in flavour and variety, keeping you satisfied, energised, and free from cravings.

We cater to those ready for a change: busy individuals seeking convenience, people managing conditions like prediabetes, diabetes, or hypertension, or anyone wanting to look and feel their best for a special occasion.
HealthFull Meals isn't just about dropping kilograms; it's about regaining control, boosting your confidence, and investing in your long-term well-being.

It's scientifically formulated, dietitian-designed, delicious food that helps you feel better, one satisfying bite at a time.

Description:

Made from the thickest, strongest aluminium foil on the market, Qbag is designed to make cooking healthy food, in a conventional oven and outside on the barbecue grill, simple and fuss-free.

Over the last 8 years since acquiring the business, manufacturing operation and IP from FFP Packaging we’ve created different sizes and variations of Qbags, but we’ve never deviated from our original award-winning design.

- Extend the Selling Season of Fresh/Frozen Food and Ready-to-Cook Meals

Contact Sonia Ginty here on LinkedIn to find out more.

Name: SanDai Fishball Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to SanDai Fishball – 100% yellow tail fishball & yong tau foo. Since 1960s.

I'm Delonix, the third-generation owner of SanDai Fishball. Our journey began in the 1960s when my grandfather, Tan Kok Heng, started our humble fishball stall known as HengKee Fishball & Yong Tau Foo. Rooted in tradition, our stall started as a road-side pushcart and eventually found a home in Toapayoh Lor 7 Hawker Center, where we've been serving our beloved customers ever since.

In 2020, I took the leap to expand our business and introduce a new chapter to our story. With a vision to capture the essence of three generations, I rebranded our stall to become SanDai Fishball – representing the journey of my grandfather, father, and now myself. "SanDai" translates to "Three Generation" in Chinese, symbolizing the enduring spirit and tradition we bring to our fishballs and yong tau foo.

Our commitment to authenticity is unwavering. We're proud to use only the finest ingredients, with 100% yellow tail fish as the heart of our creations.
Occasionally, we incorporate Wolf Herring fish, known as "Sai Toh Her" in Teochew or "Ikan Parang" in Malay, to elevate our flavors.

What truly sets us apart is our dedication to preserving tradition: we never compromise with artificial preservatives, surimi, starch, or chemicals. It's an investment that may be costly, but it's a commitment to our values and to delivering the most genuine, fresh, and authentic fishball and yong tau foo to all of our customers.

SanDai Fishball stands as a testament to heritage and quality – a labor of love that spans three generations. Join us on this journey as we bring the flavors of tradition to your plate.

Thousands of miles away from large sources of pollution that can contaminate the human food supply in other parts of the world, these distances, combined with the earth’s patterns of circulation of water and air, help to ensure that Alaska’s own waters are among the cleanest in the world.
 
Now delivering quality Alaskan seafood door-to-door in Singapore, try the famous Alaskan king crab, snow crab, wild salmon, halibut, black cod, and much more in a mouse-click!

Name: Dine Inn
Description:
Dine Inn is an online platform dedicated to bringing together the makers and lovers of food - breaking down physical barriers and putting the food you want, right in the palm of your hand. The concept is the brainchild of four epicureans who strongly believe that Singapore’s best kept secrets are hidden in plain sight.

Known endearingly as hosts and guests, the app empowers home cooks to take their love for cooking to the next level as their own boss. Hosts can earn an income from cooking the things they love out of the comfort of their home kitchens, according to their own convenience and schedule. Comprehensive assistance is also provided in the form of food photography and publicity.

Dine Inn pairs talented home chefs with foodies on the hunt for authentic eats - guaranteeing you a match made in food heaven. As a guest, you’ll be able to browse through different host listings, take your pick from a catalogue of home-cooked meals, and customise your meals according to your preferences and price range. Every order comes with the option of delivery or self-collection, allowing you full flexibility and control over your meal.

You’ll also be able to organise your own private dinner party - complete with your own personal chef - at home, or at a host’s home for a truly unique dining experience.

Name: KNP Trading Pte Ltd
Description:
Suriya Trading Enterprises (S) Pte Ltd and KNP Trading Pte Ltd (Housebrand) originated from KNP Trading Company, founded in 1958 by Sri K N Unnithan. His vision was to make home food preparation easier for housemakers. Guided by his principles, Housbrand strives to stay true to its motto till today; "Enhancing Food Experience."  

Initially, the business started with a spice grinding factory in Singapore's Naval Base area, offering ground spices and flour under the House Brand. In 2018, Suriya moved to a state-of-the-art, multi-storey facility at 50 Senoko Drive, featuring fully automated spice processing, packaging, and food manufacturing lines. Name: Armiya Food
Description: Welcome to MOHAMAD ARMIYA FOOD INDUSTRY. We are a Singapore-based manufacturer/supplier of frozen halal meatballs such as beef meatballs, chicken meatballs, mutton meatballs as well as frozen halal burgers and marinated halal meat that include chicken burgers, beef burgers and frozen spicy beef lungs. We have been in business since the 1990s supplying quality frozen marinated and non marinated halal meat and halal meatballs to many food establishments, restaurants, hotels and local retailers in and around Singapore and Johor Bahru. With factories in Singapore and Johor Bahru, we pride ourselves in producing and delivering quality products and services. Over the years we have been constantly upgrading our processes to meet the demand of the market place and our customers. Through hard work, we are now proud to announce that the company has earned the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Point (HACCP) certification while most of our frozen halal meatballs and halal meat products have also been endorsed as the Healthier Choice by the Singapore Health Promotion Board. All our products are Halalan Thoyyiban- the best of the best in Halal- from storage, production to packaging- our processes are certified safe and halal, having been awarded the Majlis Ugama Islam Singapura Halal (MUIS) certification. In deed the primary reason for our existence is to provide our customers with the safest, top quality frozen marinated and non marinated halal meatballs and meat at a competitive price. The combination of our local factories, distributors and widest selection of fresh, frozen, marinated and non marinated halal meatballs and halal meat enables us to offer our customers with good, quality and invaluable service. Our products met the requirements of halal food provider for consumers whom only consumed halal food and to establishments and other eateries whom needs halal food for their patrons, guests, clients, tourists, canteens and employees.

Name: Quality Meat SG
Description:
Quality Meat is one of the top leading provider of halal-certified, ethically sourced beef and lamb, trusted across the ASEAN region for its commitment to excellence, transparency, and innovation. We specialize in premium cuts and marinated meats that deliver consistent flavour, tenderness, and convenience.

Our products are sourced from Singapore Food Agency (SFA) approved plants across the world such as Australian, and are known for their high animal welfare standards and sustainable practices. Each cut is expertly trimmed, flash-frozen at peak freshness, and certified halal—ensuring quality you can see, taste, and trust.

What sets us apart is our chef-inspired marinated range, designed for versatility and ease. From garlic rosemary lamb to smoky black pepper beef, our marinades enhance the natural richness of the meat without overpowering it. These ready-to-cook options are perfect for grilling, roasting, or pan-searing, making them ideal for busy weeknights, family BBQs, or celebratory feasts.

We believe premium meat should be accessible and affordable. That’s why our products offer exceptional value for money, combining top-tier quality with reasonable pricing. Whether you're a home cook or a professional chef, Quality Meat helps you serve meals that are memorable, meaningful, and made with integrity.

From raw beef and lamb to hybrid innovations like Q Protein, we’re redefining what modern halal meat can be flavourful, versatile, and aligned with evolving consumer values.

Name: Usha Martin Singapore
Description:
Usha Martin is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of steel wire rope. Established in the year 1960, today Usha Martin is a multi-unit and multi-product organisation. The wire rope manufacturing facilities that are located in India, Dubai, Bangkok and UK, produce one of the widest range of wire ropes in the world.    
Usha Martin Group is a continuously evolving organisation and global leader in finding innovative solutions for industry-wide problems. Our commitment is to ensure our wide range of products are designed towards the highest quality, whereas safety, performance and sustainability is our constant focus. With this commitment at the forefront of everything we do, our Global Design Centre (GDC) was set-up. Based within Northern Italy, at the heart of industrial activity, GDC is strategically placed to coordinate our efforts towards quality assurance and continuous improvement.
Usha Martin Singapore, being a distribution and warehousing centre, maintains wire rope stock of 4000 to 5000 ton ranging from 6mm to 127mm (6x36, 4x39, 6x29 class) and non-rotating constructions.  In addition to our stock-holding position in Singapore, we have the capacity to distribute wire ropes from our manufacturing & service facilities around the world.  
In addition, Usha Martin Singapore is equipped with top-of-the-line rigging facility to provide various end terminations like mechanical splicing and socketing for lifting and mooring application.  All products can be tested with our calibrated test bed assuring quality and peace of mind for our clients.

Name: Teochew Restaurant Huat Kee(1998) Pte Ltd
Description:
We have been serving authentic Teochew cuisine since 1969. We started from an outlet on the pavement of a coffee shop in Wayang Street. With the need for increased space we moved to Ellenborough Market in the Teochew heartland.

In 1988 we had the chance to have an open-air restaurant, which could cater to diners in the evening. This was in what was then known as Happy World in Geylang. We were there till 1993. During that time, conservation of Chinatown buildings was in full swing and we saw an opportunity to move up-market as our reputation for Teochew cuisine had grown and we had a faithful clientele that had followed us wherever we were. We felt that with growing prosperity there were also clients who wanted authentic Teochew cuisine but in a more congenial atmosphere with air-conditioning and ambience. We made the move to Amoy Street in 1993. As business prospered we felt that a better financial infrastructure had to be in place to cater for expansion. Huat Kee Teochew Restaurant, which had all the while been a family partnership, was converted into Teochew Restaurant Huat Kee (1998) Pte. Ltd.

Name: Thoughtful Food SG
Description:
100% Plant for All Cuisines, All Diets.
Nutritious, Affordable & Sustainable for a Deliciously Better Future. 
(Made in Singapore)

Meat is one of the highest consumables globally & brings about unsustainable issues that include food safety, expensive prices, environmental degradation & animal rights amongst many more. 

Gathering experiences in food technology, sustainability & culinary skills, THOUGHTFUL’s humble approach is by providing a delicious, unique & localized plant-based meat alternative solution. Through direct engagement & education, THOUGHTFUL aims to inspire people to think differently about quality protein sources & move towards more conscious, sustainable ways of eating, one plant-based meal at a time.

THOUGHTFUL PLANT-MEAT DRY MIXES: CHICKEN, BEEF, PROTEIN & PRAWN

Why dry? Staying dry allows our products to be minimally processed while retaining the maximum nutritional benefits for our consumers. Ranking high for protein quality backed by PDCAAS reports, THOUGHTFUL is “25% lower in saturated fat & sodium compared to regular plant-based meat alternatives” offered in the current market (HPB Singapore). With all necessary essential fatty & amino acids the body needs to grow, stay strong & healthy, THOUGHTFUL is an ideal product to provide the perfect protein!

Long shelf life is guaranteed, promising zero food waste. No refrigeration or freezing needed for transportation also means unbeatable end-to-end cost efficiency for chefs, caterers & end-users while ensuring lower carbon emission. 

Once reconstituted, THOUGHTFUL has a texture just like ground meat which can be used as a meat substitute in soups, stews, sauces, burgers, stir-fries, gyozas, meatballs, etc. With no added artificial seasonings or additives, THOUGHTFUL can be spiced & seasoned to suit all dietary requirements, all cuisines. 

DM us for collaboration!

Name: Fire Terminator International Pte Ltd
Description:
Fire Terminator International is a Singapore-based manufacturer and provider of innovative fire fighting solutions. We specialize in developing green, non-toxic, and PFAS-free fire suppression products for all classes of fires, including forest fires. With a strong commitment to environmental sustainability and safety, we offer cutting-edge solutions that prioritize both effective fire control and ecological responsibility.
Green Fire Suppression Solutions: We have developed a range of environmentally friendly fire suppression agents that are highly effective in extinguishing fires while minimizing harm to the environment. Our solutions are free from PFAS (Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances) and other toxic chemicals, making them safe for use in a variety of settings.
Customized Firefighting Solutions: We understand that different industries have unique fire risks and requirements. That's why we offer customized firefighting solutions tailored to specific sectors, including refineries, chemical plants, tank farms, and more. Our team of experts works closely with clients to develop and implement effective fire control strategies that mitigate risks and ensure optimal safety.
AI-Aided Firefighting Solutions: Leveraging the power of artificial intelligence (AI), we provide advanced firefighting solutions that incorporate smart technology. Our AI systems analyze real-time data from various sensors and devices, allowing for early fire detection and proactive response. By harnessing IoT technology, we create integrated systems that enhance the effectiveness and efficiency of fire control measures.
At Fire Terminator International, our mission is to provide state-of-the-art fire fighting solutions that prioritize environmental sustainability, human safety, and efficient fire control. We are dedicated to developing innovative products and leveraging cutting-edge technologies to address fire risks effectively while minimizing ecological impact.

CS Foods was established in March 1991. We distribute only halal certified frozen meat and ready to eat products in Singapore. Well known in Geylang Seria, Tekka and many wet markets in Singapore.

Name: Orca - At the top of your food chain
Description:
Since 2009, Orca Marketing has been Singapore’s premier partner for premium meat and seafood solutions. Born from deep roots in the seafood trade and nurtured through a passion for uncompromising quality, we serve as the reliable supply chain link between the world’s best protein producers and Singapore’s top kitchens.

We specialise in sourcing, processing, and delivering chilled, live, and frozen meat and seafood from trusted origins, including Australia, New Zealand, Japan, and beyond. Over time, we have expanded into beef, lamb, pork, and deli products, growing our portfolio to meet the evolving needs of the foodservice sector.

Our portfolio includes some of the world’s most respected producers, from Blackmore and Stone Axe Wagyu to Little Joe, Portoro, Gooralie Free Range Pork, Kinross Station Lamb, Akaroa King Salmon, Fremantle Octopus, Yarra Valley Caviar, and more. These partnerships ensure every cut and catch reflects the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and provenance.

Through our integrated butchery facility in Senoko, we provide custom processing, SFA-licensing compliance, and same-day delivery across Singapore, ensuring precision, consistency, and speed for our clients.

Our retail arm, Butcher Box, brings these premium proteins directly to consumers while supporting F&B customers through wholesale solutions, all backed by Orca’s robust supply chain, storage, and distribution infrastructure.

If you’re a chef, purchasing manager, or hotel GM seeking a dependable partner with supply certainty, premium sourcing, and personalised service, connect with us. Let’s build a relationship that gives your kitchen access to the finest ingredients, delivered with the consistency and care your menu deserves.

Keeping in mind these corporate philosophies and the social responsibilities that we should fulfil, we will strive to further evolve as a company in the food industry.

Ban Choon Marketing Pte. Ltd (headquartered in Singapore) became a member of Wismettac Group in January 2022. Today, Ban Choon Marketing imports fresh produce (vegetables and fruits) from all over

Importer and Distributor of Fresh Fruits, Vegetables, Organic Grocery Products, Cage-Free Eggs and Plant-based food. We work with exporters from USA, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Netherlands, Spain, France, Italy, Turkey, China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, Australia, New Zealand and many other countries.

Name: Spirit Vault Collective
Description:
Our team behind the Spirit Vault Collective holds the same passion and ambition you have in investing and collecting, and we're looking forward to having like-minded individuals joining the Collective. In 2019 Knight Frank released their first investment index that specifically mentioned whisky as an asset class to be taken seriously, which further underlined our conviction in this space.  In 2020, rare whisky topped the Knight Frank index again, rising in value by 564% in the last ten years.

As drinkers and investors of whisky over the past +15 years, we are pleased to offer our clients access to this exciting asset class for the future.  We work with experienced traders, investors and distributors across the globe, have a deep knowledge of premium distilleries and brands in the market, and have existing supplier relationships within the industry.  Our founder’s personal portfolio has achieved +350% returns over the first 5 years, which we aim to replicate for our investors through Spirit Vault Collective.

Spirit Vault Collective is a structured investment vehicle based in Singapore. We trade in premium, rare and collectible whiskies to maximise pricing returns. Our inventory is held in one of 3 locations in Scotland, Singapore or South Africa which ensures that our valuation is always supported by underlying physical assets.

We hold a diverse portfolio across multiple brands and distilleries to protect against downside risks and are able to buy or sell whisky rapidly through existing distribution channels. This enables us to maintain an optimal portfolio providing the highest possible returns for our investors.

SVC Holdings Pte Ltd officially opened as a local trading company in August 2018 and began active purchasing of whisky with founder’s equity in the same month. On 1st April 2019, we opened our doors to external investors.
