Name: Coconut&Co / Siam Coconut Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Coconut&Co is the consumer identity of Siam Coconut Pte. Ltd., a full-service coconut processor, importer, and distributor based in Singapore. We deliver fresh, functional, and premium coconut and wellness products to the retail, foodservice, hospitality, and event sectors.

We specialise in value-added coconut products, including pre-cut Thai coconuts, raw and pasteurised coconut water, frozen coconut meat, coconut jelly, and more. Our in-house processing facility allows us to offer customisation, quality control, and fast turnaround — ensuring peak freshness and food safety.

Our operations are supported by our own cold chain logistics fleet, including a dedicated van sales team that services both the modern trade and foodservice sectors. This enables direct-to-store chilled deliveries, shelf stocking, and merchandising for supermarkets, cafés, restaurants, and convenience outlets.

In addition to our own range of coconut products, we also distribute a curated portfolio of health-forward brands, including:
	•	COCOLOCO – Premium coconut water in PURE, FRESH, and RAW formats
	•	Cocotre – Easy-to-drink Vietnamese coconuts
	•	137 Degrees – Thailand’s leading plant-based milks
	•	MarkRin Chocolates – Bean-to-bar Thai chocolate
	•	Selva Earth – Wild-harvested açaí and rainforest products
	•	Curated Culture – Probiotic fermented teas and functional beverages

We supply to national retailers, boutique grocers, hotel groups, health-focused cafés, and event organizers. We also support contract manufacturing, private label development, and market entry for brands looking to grow in Singapore.

Whether you’re seeking a coconut partner, chilled logistics support, or looking to bring your brand to market, Coconut&Co offers a complete solution — from sourcing to cold chain to shelf.

Naturally Better. That’s our promise.

Name: Aroma Truffle & Co.
Description:
Celebrate Sophistication

The idea for Aroma Truffle started with a trip to Italy. To the Italians, the harvesting of ingredients, preparation and final dish was a demonstration of their passion and a form of refined art. A dear Italian friend hosted our visit to a Spoleto farm, and our eyes were opened to the world of truffles. We witnessed firsthand the entire process from farming to harvesting of Italian truffles, and discovered the hard work, discipline and artisanship involved. All of which drew strength from the fine traditions and cultures of Italy. This burning passion, which is not commonly found around the world, it drew our hearts inexorably towards it.

Aroma Truffle was then founded with one powerful vision: to bring the authentic taste of Italy to the rest of the world. A team of passionate individuals, Aroma Truffle strives for and challenges norms in the pursuit of quality and innovation. We do it all in order to serve up sophisticated, yet consistently delicious products that will satisfy even the most discerning palate. Aroma Truffle is made by passionate people for passionate people, with a taste for sophistication.

- 10 Most Creative Entrepreneurs From the Food And Beverage Industry In 2021 by APAC Entrepreneur
- Elite Business And Leadership Award 2021

- Top Choice Awards For Excellence 2020-2021

Name: Prorika
Description:
Who We Are
Bring together experienced individuals from the ingredient business, a challenging mission and an excellent proprietary product – and there you have the foundation of Prorika.

Operating in Europe, Prorika’s focus product comes from its own source. We serve all food industry players who see alternative protein as key to a sustainable food system that reduces climate impact and boosts profits.

What We Do
The basis of our offering is nutritious, quality plant based protein, alongside a multitude of environmental advantages. Legumes like soy and peas require little water and enrich the soil by fixing atmospheric nitrogen, benefiting regenerative farming.

Why We Do It
It is an undeniable fact that plant proteins account for half the climate impact compared to animal proteins, and that protein is one of the three macronutrients that human beings need to nourish themselves. Therefore, we find it encouraging to witness the rising demand for sustainable protein-rich alternatives that can both supplement and replace traditional protein sources, resulting in a more sustainable business model – improving the planet, people and profit.

The Mission
But – it is not enough to rely on high sustainability benefits with low impact. We must work to do more.

Therefore, our simple mission is to increase plant-based protein consumption for a sustainable planet and a healthier you.

Join us on our journey.

Name: Kim Hing Food Industries & Dragon Brand Bird's Nest Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1957 by Mr Tan Kim Pheow, Kim Hing Company processes and sells Chinese delicacies such as bird’s nests, shark’s fins and other traditional health products. With the advancement in food technology in the 1960s, Kim Hing Company ventured into food processing, focusing on the preparation of bird’s nests. Kim Hing Company set up its first retail outlet in Peninsula Shopping Centre.

Increasing competition in the bird’s nest processing industry in the 1980’s spurred Kim Hing Company to invest heavily in research and development to stay in the forefront of the market. These investments enabled Kim Hing Company to successfully develop the World’s first glass-bottled bird’s nest in 1986. Advanced processing equipment and manufacturing processes were adopted - products were hermetically sealed with vacuum technology and hygienically sterilized by a heat treatment process.

The result was a ready-to-eat bird’s nest product with prolonged shelf life which retains the original flavours and nutrients of traditionally prepared bird’s nest. This innovation cemented Kim Hing Company’s position as the pioneer in this industry.

The Kim Hing Group consists of:
Kim Hing Company
Kim Hing Investments Pte Ltd
Kim Hing Food Industries Pte Ltd
Dragon Brand Birds Nest Pte Ltd

Name: Nyee Guan Fish Ball Food Industry
Description:
About Nyee Guan Fish Ball - 圆源鱼丸

Nyee Guan Fish ball was set up in the early days of Hougang, Singapore, the ‘Ang Sa Li’ fish ball was very fasmous and well known by the residents. 
What attracted the people most was it’s freshness. Eventually, the demand for it increase rapidly, which lead to the expansion of their business. From small wet market to a ‘high Technology Manufacturing Factory’. With the loyal support of its regulars, Nyee Guan has rapidly grown to be stable and well-known in the fish ball market.

Nyee Guan revolutionised the concept of converting traditional hand-made products to High Technology manufacturing, along with quality control for each and every fish ball. Name: Happy Mummy Confinement Food Catering Service
Description: We provide the healthiest choice of confinement food during your confinement period. The food is specially prepared by our unique secret recipe that provides you a balance diet, moderate TCM herbs are added to provide detox and cleansing function of your body system and at the same time build up your immune system that is beneficial for both mother and child especially if you are breast feeding. All meals are specially consulted by dietitian to provide a balance diet together with adequate exercise you will be back in shape after your confinement period.

Name: The Gourmet Pie Company Pte Ltd
Description:
The Gourmet Pie Company was established in the quest of bringing the taste of a truly great pie to Singapore.  Drawing on three generations of family recipes incorporating the flavours of Asia and after months of fine-tuning the pastry and fillings our pies were created. 

The list of pies continues to grow and incorporates a wide variety of flavours from Asia, Australia, and England.  Made only from Australian beef and New Zealand lamb together with other local fresh ingredients.

We are committed in serving food that is of great quality and freshness. The pies are handmade in Singapore and baked fresh every day.

The Gourmet Pie Company is Eco-friendly. We use packaging and utensils that are completely biodegradable such as the corn utensils,corn plastic bags and we only use recyclable take-away pie boxes.

We are passionate about bringing you a handmade, deep-dish pie filled with the freshest ingredients. You wont go away hungry.

Name: Guan Chun Ding Pte Ltd
Description:
Guan Chun Ding Pte Ltd started up as a biscuit wholesaler and retailer in 2002.

Today, we import and distribute over 200 products ranging from food products to beverages, which includes our house-brand products.

We are committed to source for fast-moving and quality food and beverages locally and globally, to offer a diverse range of products to meet every customer needs at a competitive price.

We service a wide range of customers including households, mini-marts, bakeries, caterers, offices, hotels, events, government sectors, retailers and wholesalers.

Our services include distribution, customisation and OEM services. Through our network, we are able to provide the best solutions to meet your needs.

All enquiries are welcome.

Name: Daishichi Agencies Pte Ltd
Description:
We are an experienced wholesale trading company based in Singapore, focusing on perfume fragrances and cosmetics products. Our trade network covers parts of SE Asia, Europe and US. 

We believe in long term partnerships with our customers and suppliers, working closely to grow together globally.

Name: Tiap Tiap
Description:
TiapTiap is a Singapore-based family business dedicated to celebrating heritage recipes and creating thoughtful food experiences. We focus on fresh, locally sourced ingredients to craft dishes that feel both familiar and special.

Our signature range includes our bestselling pandan chiffon cakes, ondeh ondeh kaya, and a collection of nostalgic treats inspired by Peranakan and Southeast Asian traditions. Every recipe is developed with care to bring the comfort of home cooking into modern gatherings.

Beyond our products, TiapTiap also hosts private dining experiences under Butterfly Table, which has been featured on media platforms such as Vogue Singapore, Tatler Luxury, CNA Luxury, Timeout, Masterchef, Lee Kum Kee and widely recognised as one of Singapore’s most unique dining concepts. We love creating warm, personal meals where guests can reconnect over good food.

Our small, agile team believes food has the power to bring people together in meaningful ways, and we’re committed to sharing that spirit through everything we do.

Name: PIN SI KITCHEN PTE LTD
Description: Pin Si Kitchen Pte Ltd specializes in providing Chinese delicacies. The company operates in the food and beverage manufacturing industry and offers a range of services including hot food delivery and private dining. Pin Si Kitchen is known for its commitment to delivering quality food at affordable prices. The company also provides catering services for various occasions, ensuring a memorable dining experience for its customers.

Paperich is a leading provider and manufacturer of Office products and Lifestyle accessories.

We offer a wide assortment of products with strong brand equity to both professionals and individuals.

More than 100 millions consumers recognize our brands worldwide with over 12 millions of loyal customers. 

Innovation is the cornerstone of our strategy with more than 2,000 products launched annualy.

Name: Bansbach easylift Asia
Description:
Bansbach easylift We manufacturer high quality, gas springs, linear actuators, dampers, guide columns and many other motion control devices.

Bansbach was founded in Lorch, Germany in 1919 as a manufacturer of stamping tools. With our in house turning shop, and over 50 years of experience in gas spring production, we evolved into a world wide industry leader for motion control products.

We have offices in Lorch, Germany, Singapore and Melbourne, FL, USA, which provide a global footprint to support our distribution networks.

Bansbach Easylift Asia Pte Ltd is a 100% subsidiary of Bansbach easylift, has since then been the centre of operations in Asia. A representative office to manage the Asia operations and become the transshipment point for the Bansbach gas springs in South-East Asia. 

Email us at sales@bansbach-asia.com , with your enquires or request for a quotation of our products.

Name: KTR Systems Singapore Pte Ltd
Description:
KTR - We set the world in motion.
Made for Motion – KTR has been developing power transmission components for mechanical and plant engineering under this slogan for more than fifty years. 
As a leading manufacturer of high-grade power transmission technology, brake systems and cooling systems, and hydraulic components, KTR is a dependable partner for any company that wishes to keep moving forward.

Name: RJ Epicurean
Description:
RJ Epicurean is more than a food manufacturing company; it's a custodian of culinary traditions. We specialize in producing gourmet culinary products, with a special focus on our time-honored chili belachan. 

Our mission is to safeguard the authenticity of this beloved recipe while fostering a spirit of innovation that expands our range of gourmet offerings, enriching your culinary journey. We are resolute in sharing flavors that have been cherished for generations with a global audience.

Our products, including the renowned Jia-Home Chili Belachan, are designed to inspire culinary enthusiasts around the globe. Visit www.artisannook.sg to explore our offerings.

For inquiries about our products, partnerships, or culinary collaborations, reach out to us at jiahomesambal@artisannook.sg.

Name: Umami Chefs
Description: UMAMI Chefs was born out of our desire to provide convenient gourmet meals tailored for busy lifestyles. Another innovative venture by Esseplore, a tech-driven food company on a mission to re-engineer the gourmet meal experience through home-cooked food, UMAMI Chefs follows a similar philosophy to create an elevated dining experience with the convenience of a ready-to-heat format.

Name: House of Braised 卤味家
Description:
House of braised is founded by two good army friends, Zheng Zhi Bin and William Tan. Both have know each other since army days and share the same passion for food.

Zhi Bin love for cooking was passed down by his late Father. He has been cooking since the age of 16 from Sembawang Hills Food Centre to Old Airport Road Food Centre.

William have been in the F&B scene since he left army. He has now 10 over years of managing F&B experience.

Not just braised duck, both Zhi Bin and William want to bring good local braised food for everyone to enjoy its full of hearty and robust flavour.

Name: Perfect Food Singapore

We have a wide varieties of poultry, sea food, red meat for you to select.  Fast , easy, comprehensive and convenient way of ordering and deliver to any parts of Singapore.

Name: Baan Ying Pte Ltd
Description:
Sawasdee kha, and a warm welcome to Baan Ying. When we first started out all those years ago, it was with a humble restaurant of eight tables serving simple home-cooked food in Bangkok’s Siam Square. 

Today Baan Ying consists of seven restaurants across prime locations in Bangkok and opening new restaurants overseas with the first in Singapore. What remains the same is the real taste of Thai home cooking we serve our customers from near and far.

Name: FoodMOP
Description: FoodMOP is about Creating Cravings for food made of plants.

Name: InstaChef Pro

InstaChef Pro’s K Series is a full-stack kitchen solution built for modern food businesses.

We combine automated cooking technology, chef-curated menus, and an end-to-end food supply system—giving you everything you need to run fast, consistent, and scalable operations.

Name: Tian Wei Signature
Description: Tian Wei Signature began with our desire to create appetizing meals for confinement mothers so that they do not miss out on the essential ingredients needed to boost their recovery.

Name: Chompétit, by Willie
Description:
The concept of Chompétit baked treats for pets was conceived by Willem van Kruijsbergen when he founded Bake4Pets in 2015. The baked treats are produced by Diversi Foods, a leading player in the world of bakery from Belgium. These Chompétit healthy and tasty baked muffins, cakes and biscuits for pets, are non-GMO, all-natural and additive-free, and are presented in attractive shapes, and natural colours. 

Headquartered in Belgium with production plants in Belgium, Netherlands, France, Germany, UK and Poland, Diversi Foods specialises in authentic recipes and traditional production methods. You can find baguettes, breads, rolls, buns, snacks, pizzas, crumbles and patisserie, produced by Diversi Foods in many large retail chains like Carrefour, Delhaize, Tesco, Metro, Makro, Albert Heijn, Marks & Spencer, Lidl and many more. 

When we say natural, we really mean natural. These treats do not contain artificial flavours or colours, additives, or E numbers.

100% natural ingredients are used. Fresh broccoli, spinach, beets, raisins, berries and carrot are mixed in the dough. For the topping, sesame seeds, linseeds, pumpkin seeds and sunflower seeds are used. For the bird and little animal snacks, dried raisins and berries are used for the toppings.

These products enjoy a shelf life of 20 months. 

The facility in which the baked treats are produced, is incredibly strict in terms of hygiene and safety. Even pallets are not allowed in the production plant.

Diversification is key for Straits Union in 2017. In an effort to expand into new markets, yet, keeping to its fun food concept, the company chanced upon Willem van Kruijsbergen’s Bake4Pets, 

The all-natural and additive-free muffins, cakes and biscuits will be launched in Singapore by the last quarter of 2017, and in Malaysia and Australia by the second quarter of 2018, under the company's private label, Chompétit, by Willie. We are really excited about this new business venture with Willem, and our new newly-appointed distributorship by Bake4Pets, as we are very passionate pet lovers as well! 

Distributors and retailers of Chompétit, by Willie’s range of products will be fully supported with pro-active marketing and branding activities, including print and digital collateral, display shelf units, micro-site content development, social media engagements, media buys, email communications, media and influencers relations and events, as well as corporate social responsibility events.

Name: M&D Precision Technology Pte Ltd
Description: Established in 1994, M&D Precision Technology Pte Ltd began its journey as a trading company, specializing in sales and marketing within the Medical and Semiconductor industries. With over three decades of experience, our company has evolved into a leading manufacturer of precision components, serving clients worldwide.

Name: Ah Pau Chop
Description: Ah Pau Chop began as a family business handed down from one generation to another while upholding the family motto of ‘The root of Chinese Heritage’. The company has made significant progress since its humble beginnings as a small retail cart selling dried provisions along the Singapore River in the 1950s and along Teo Chew Street in the early 1960s. Ah Pau Chop was officially established as a partnership business in 1976 and transformed itself into a wholesale-cum-retail business model, serving major restaurant chains and the general population, situated at Victoria Street Wholesale Centre in Bugis. Over the decades, Ah Pau Chop continued to serve its customers with dedication and has now become a popular go-to destination for festive goods by Singaporeans during the Lunar New Year festive season. Today, the business has relocated to the Victoria Wholesale Centre in Kallang and continues to garner a strong following by its clientele.

Description: Located in downtown Singapore, The Vermilion House is a highly rated Mediterranean restaurant that offers a sensory culinary experience. With a focus on quality ingredients, exquisite flavors, and warm hospitality, The Vermilion House creates memorable dining moments that delight the senses and transport guests to the vibrant Mediterranean region.

Name: SHIVSAGAR TRADING PTE. LTD.
Description:
At Shivsagar, we are committed to bringing the nearest store to you, ensuring the fastest delivery of your groceries. Whenever you need it, you can easily reach out to your closest store. We are your one-stop shop for all your daily essentials. Our mission is simple: Your Satisfaction, Our Growth.

We offer a wide assortment of groceries, fresh fruits and vegetables, cosmetics, electronics, bakery items, flowers, and much more, all at the best quality and lowest prices.

Name: Seng Huat Bean Curd Pte Ltd
Description:
Seng Huat Bean Curd provides island wide supply of fresh Taukwa to wet markets, restaurants, catering kitchens, retail outlets, minimarts & supermarkets. 

Previously a Professional Racehorse Jockey, Mr Alan Ng left his 14 years of racing career to help run his family business, Seng Huat, in 2013.

Alan is the 4th generation owner after Seng Huat was passed down originally by his great-grandfather who founded the business back in the 1920s. After joining the company, he has helped to boost the business in manufacturing and supplying fresh taukwa to wet markets, markets and etc.

In 2017, Alan decided to redesigned and repackaged Seng Huat core product, fresh Taukwa, into vacuum packaging. He further expanded his market share by supplying vacuum-packed taukwa into Sheng Siong supermarkets in Singapore.

In April 2017, Seng Huat Bean Curd has also successfully obtained its first Muis Halal Certification.

In 2018, Alan proved he has greater plans for the business when he introduced new machineries and technologies to help improve efficiency and boost production. Seng Huat production has since moved from the original Defu Lane factory to Jurong Food Hub, where it boosts larger factory space thus allowing Seng Huat to grow and expand its production.

Name: NICE FIT
Description:
We are selling the value, not selling products .
Our brand based on sustainable supply chain development and aiming to provide protein healthy products in our daily life.

Description: International Woodchip Corporation (“IWC”) has been supplying and trading woodchips from various global origins since 2014. We source mainly from the Southern continents (LAM, SA, Oceania and SE Asia). Most of these woodchips are transported to Asia. The company now supplies close to 4 million bone-dry metric tonnes of wood chips (over 8 million green metric tonnes).

Name: DwyerOmega APAC
Description:
DwyerOmega is a manufacturer and global provider of precision measurement solutions that improve efficiency, safety, and sustainability for our customers. Our brands include Dwyer Instruments, Omega Engineering, ACI (Automation Components, Inc.), Miljoco, Weiss Instruments, and UFM (Universal Flow Monitors).
DwyerOmega APAC is responsible for the business in Asia Pacific. The offices are located in Singapore, Australia, India, Korea, Japan and China.

Name: ZENXIN Organic Food
Description:
Founded in 2001, Zenxin Agri-Organic Food is now Malaysia’s leading grower, distributor and retailer of organic food. Since its establishment, Zenxin Agri-Organic Food has been a trusted source of delicious and healthy foods grown without chemical fertilizer and pesticides. Zenxin Organic Food is popular for its down-to-earth reputation and tasty organic vegetables and fruits in major supermarkets in Malaysia and Singapore region. With strong credibility and large satisfied customer base, Zenxin Organic Food strives to be the leader of health food suppliers in South-East Asia.

Today, Zenxin has 18 organic shops, 3 organic distribution centres, 1 organic fertilizer factory, 1 recreation park - Zenxin Organic Park and has Zenxin Organic brand fresh produce distributed in the across Malaysia, Singapore and China. We pursue the sustainable goal of becoming the leader of organic food in Asia!

We welcome to join us to explore jobs or collaboration activities in the organic food industry!

Name: Mycosortia
Description:
Here's a LinkedIn company overview summarizing Mycosortia in one paragraph:
Mycosortia is a pioneering food technology company specializing in upcycling food waste into high-value, plant-based ingredients. Our proprietary microbial biotransformation technology transforms food side streams into FibProt, a sustainable and versatile ingredient with applications in plant-based foods, confectionery, and flavoring. We partner with B2B customers to supply FibProt as a clean-label solution and also develop and market innovative, sustainable food products like plant-based cheese and cocoa-free chocolate-like treats through B2B2C channels. Join us in revolutionizing the food system and creating a more sustainable future.

Name: Yappy Pets Pte Ltd
Description:
We are just like you: animal lovers who want to give them the best.

That’s why our family makes delicious, nutritionally complete food and treats, with many ingredients sourced from New Zealand and USA. Places that work hard towards best practices in food production, as we do.
Because we understand what matters: not just feeding well but feeding well regularly, giving animal companions what they need for happier, longer, and healthier lives. You’ll often find us working alongside nutritionists in our kitchens, trying and rethinking and improving recipes, for that perfect taste, quality, and nutrition to satisfy your pet as well as your household budget.

Name: Artisan Green
Description:
Artisan Green is an indoor CEA hydroponic farm specialising in growing baby spinach.

We believe that every community deserves nutritious and fresh ingredients for healthy eating. Thus, we want to reintroduce FRESH to the urban community. Using hydroponics technology, we deliver locally grown greens which are fresher, cleaner and more sustainable. 

Our vertical farm maximise yields using minimal land resources, while saving 90% of water consumption compared to traditional soil-based farming. Also, our produce are completely free from pesticides. Given that our farm is local, food miles are drastically reduced, cutting on carbon emissions.

Choose Local. Choose Clean. Choose Fresh.

Name: Hosen Group Ltd
Description:
Hosen Group, or Hock Seng Food, was established in the 1970s and has since grown to become one of Asia’s leading importers, exporters and distributors of fast moving consumer goods (“FMCG”), specialising in packaged foods. The Company adopted the name Hosen Group Ltd when it went public on the Singapore Stock Exchange in September 2004.

Hosen Group, through its wholly-owned subsidiaries in Singapore, Malaysia and China, has developed an extensive and robust distribution network that spans Asia, Europe, Middle East, Africa and the Oceanic countries. Today, Hosen’s brands of products can be found on the various continents of the world.

Our brands are renowned for providing premium quality products at affordable prices. With more than 40 years of experience in brand management and product development, we have won many accolades and bagged numerous awards over the years, including the Most Promising Brand Award, Superbrands Award, and Influential Brand Award, The Company has also been awarded Singapore 1000 Company (Public Listed) for consecutive years.

Name: LUSH PLATTERS
Description:
Create a gastronomic adventure at your next event by serving our show-stopping luxury platters, styled boxes and lavish grazing tables. Proud innovators and food artists within the catering industry, we are the pioneers of this ‘grazing’ style in Singapore.

With a passion for delicious and fresh produce, our sumptuous feasts feature an abundance of premium products. Your guests will savour the wonderful flavours of speciality and artisanal cheeses, charcuterie, wholesome dips, fresh and dried fruit, and accompaniments.

Our menu includes house-made items such as crackers and dips, roasted nuts, salads and light bites. Decorated with homegrown organic verdant herbs and vibrant flowers, our delectable grazing tables and platters will not only wow the discerning palate, but also create an eye-catching centrepiece at your next event. 

Let us elevate your occasions – birthdays, weddings, corporate functions, virtual meetings, celebrations or even relaxed social gatherings with a couple of friends – to become genuinely memorable foodie affairs!

Name: Artisan Green
Description:
Artisan Green is an indoor CEA hydroponic farm specialising in growing baby spinach.

We believe that every community deserves nutritious and fresh ingredients for healthy eating. Thus, we want to reintroduce FRESH to the urban community. Using hydroponics technology, we deliver locally grown greens which are fresher, cleaner and more sustainable. 

Our vertical farm maximise yields using minimal land resources, while saving 90% of water consumption compared to traditional soil-based farming. Also, our produce are completely free from pesticides. Given that our farm is local, food miles are drastically reduced, cutting on carbon emissions.

Choose Local. Choose Clean. Choose Fresh.

Name: Cooking Art
Description:
OUR HISTORY
Cooking Art was birthed in the 1980s as one of Singapore's pioneer professional culinary schools. Under the directives of its Wilton-trained founder, Mrs Esther Kim Sim, Cooking Art soon became one of Singapore’s premium cooking schools. In the mid-90s, Cooking Art entered a new arena to meet rising needs for a first-rate local dessert supplier for Singapore’s hotel industry. Using the wealth of culinary expertise garnered from her acclaimed cooking school days, Cooking Art went behind the scenes and has since grown to serve Singapore’s 5-star hotels and Istana events, with special requests from international delegates to give them the experience of unique Singaporean desserts.

OUR WORK
Through our years of experience, Cooking Art has had the pleasure and privilege of serving Singapore’s top hotels and partnering with Singapore’s best executive and pastry chefs on local and international projects such as overseas Singapore food promotions, local heritage celebrations and in-house events and promotions.

QUALITY ASSURANCE
Specializing in Nonya Kuehs and other local delights, our products are made fresh every day in our 24-hour, year-round ISO22000 kitchens to ensure that our customers always get the freshest of products. Here at Cooking Art, we believe in caring for our customers by caring for theirs too. Our products do not contain any preservatives. It is, and always has been, a pleasure provide our customers with products that offer the best local culinary experiences.

Name: Altimate Nutrition
Description:
Altimate Nutrition was founded to disrupt the food industry by creating innovative, sustainable products that can help tackle pressing issues like hunger and food insecurity.

At the core of our mission lies a commitment to leveraging insect (cricket) proteins as a tasty, nutritious, and eco-friendly solution. Cricket protein is the sustainable protein of the future, requiring significantly less water, energy, feed, and land while generating lower greenhouse gas emissions.

Beyond its environmental benefits, cricket-based products offer unparalleled nutritional advantages, including enhanced protein quality, a rich profile of micronutrients and essential fatty acids, and a low-calorie density. Notably, cricket farming's low-tech, low-capital requirements open economic opportunities even for underprivileged communities.

Join the revolution and be part of our mission to reshape the future of food.

Name: Alternative Selection Pte Ltd
Description:
Alternative Selection is the first wholesaler and retailer of alternative gourmet, organic, allergen and preservative free specialty foods in Singapore. Products and services offered include full comprehensive range of organic meat (beef, lamb, pork, chicken), full comprehensive range of free-range meat (beef, lamb, pork, chicken and game meat), value added meat products (sausages, meat, meat platters, etc) alongside gluten-free pastries, superfood, sauces and condiments.

Alternative Selection believes in organic agriculture and farming, sourcing directly from the best farms internationally. Working with like minded farmers who believe in stringent sustainable and responsible sourcing to offer healthy choices with full product traceability without compromising on quality, nutrition or taste. 

To offer the best meat products, Alternative Selection has a full Food (Meat) Processing Establishment that is FSSC 22000 v5.1, ACO, HACCP and SFA Accredited. With a Master Butcher heading the meat processing factory, Alternative Selection is able to offer the best quality meats and cuts to all its customers.

Alternative Selection currently supplies to shops, cafes, restaurants and hotels throughout Singapore.

Name: Seng Hua Hng Foodstuff Pte Ltd (Camel Nuts)
Description:
Seng Hua Hng Foodstuff Pte Ltd specializes in peanuts and have been producing nut snacks under the Camel Nuts Brand since 1974. It is the only large scale nuts manufacturer in Singapore and sources and imports it’s raw materials from qualified growers and farmers for processing and distribution worldwide.

The Company maintains a strong focus on quality, research and development and continuous improvement in its operational processes to bring a wider range of nutritious and tasty products to its customers worldwide.

Our customer base ranges from groceries stores to institutions, factories, airlines and retail conglomerates. We have a fleet of more than twenty vehicles that distributes our quality products to more than 2,000 retail points in Singapore and across more than forty countries across the world.

Name: Malt & Wine Asia Pte Ltd
Description:
Malt & Wine Asia is an importer and distributor of leading or emerging single malts, fine wines and craft spirits. We believe every sip counts so we employ our careful expertise to marketing and distributing a discerning portfolio of brands. As drinkers ourselves, we want to create a difference for an increasingly knowledgeable audience who enjoy quality and celebrate life.

For inquiries, you may reach us at enquiry@maltwineasia.com or call us at +65 6244 3631

Description: With over 20 years of experience, Eastern Harvest Foods is Singapore’s trusted one-stop shop for a wide variety of quality food products. From frozen essentials to gourmet ingredients, we support the HORECA and food service sectors with reliable supply tailored to local needs. Committed to bridging global food sources with local needs, we make quality accessible, helping chefs and businesses deliver exceptional experiences across Singapore.

Description: Prosperity Steel United Singapore Pte. Ltd. is an import and export company based in Singapore, the company has not only been leading the group business operation in trading, shipping, entity, investments, financing, convention and exhibition . It is currently recognised as the biggest Iron Ore Trading House.
