F.I.S.H (Fish International Sourcing House) is an international seafood group with offices and processing facilities in Singapore, China, Indonesia, Japan and Malaysia. 

We are an experienced manufacturer, distributor and exporter of deep frozen wild caught products. Our main markets include the European Union, USA, China, Russia, Japan, South America, Middle-east and East Asia. We currently work with clients from over 90 countries.

Through an efficient procurement, production and distribution system, we seek to deliver the best quality seafood products to our customers.

Name: Simple Food Solutions
Description:
SIMPLE FOOD SOLUTIONS (SFS) is the Kitchen of Innovation dedicated to simplify
food preparation. For our F&B clients, this means spending less time cooking and
more time delighting customers with quick, consistently delicious fare. Our R&D
team is composed of master chefs and food scientists dedicated to prolong food
shelf.life while elevating its quality and protecting the richness of flavour. We take
time to deeply understand the intricacies of our client's operations to customise the
simplest, smartest solution. We leverage knowledge and innovation to constantly
perfect one thing: Simplifying customers lives.

Name: Elevate Foods
Description: At Elevate Foods, we help you source your food requirements directly from the farm-gate. We work with and upgrade farm-gate food processors to provide higher quality, economical and also sustainable and traceable products to buyers across the world.

Name: Aerospring Hydroponics
Description:
At Aerospring Hydroponics, we believe that everyone should experience the health, nutrition, taste and joy of fresh produce. That’s why we have dedicated our efforts to helping people grow, eat and share food from their home, office, school, shipping vessel and elsewhere. Founded and manufactured in Singapore since 2015, Aerospring Hydroponics manufactures patented, high-quality, vertical hydroponic systems, accessories and consumables that make having a productive, useful and versatile hydroponic garden easy.

Given the challenges in the world today, including food safety, food security and sustainability, we believe there is a need to grow more food ourselves. Whatever our food situation, we must start thinking about where our food comes from, and how to grow our own, to inspire the next generation to live a more sustainable life.

Name: DASHMESH SINGAPORE PTE LTD
Description: Since inception in 1985, Dashmesh Singapore has grown into a leading dry food importer and distributor based in Singapore that specializes in various Indian and Dairy products. We have also cultivated our own successful premium house brands, Temasek Gold and Malika Gold for Basmati Rice and the Malika range of dried food products such as spices, lentils and nuts.

Name: Kleen-Pak
Description:
Kleen-Pak is a leading supplier of premium quality branded and private label wet wipes. From designing, to manufacturing, marketing, and distribution, Kleen-Pak offers a plethora of wipes including glove wipes and wiper sheets.

Headquartered in Singapore, our manufacturing facilities are located in Singapore and Vietnam and are equipped with advanced, state-of-the-art and fully automatic wet wipes manufacturing lines with combined manufacturing facilities of 12,000 square metres.

Our operations and management systems are all ISO 9001 / ISO 22716 / ASEAN Cosmetic GMP certified. We have a large portfolio of wet wipes ranging from national brands to private-labels and contract packaging across a wide variety of applications, folding formats, nonwoven substrate options, product formulations and packaging styles to cater to our ever expanding customer base.

Name: Transam Industries
Description:
Transam Industries, established in 2000 by a team of passionate imaging specialists, stands as a strategic manufacturing hub in Singapore. Our core expertise lies in the production of high-quality Thermal Transfer Ribbons (TTR), Coding Ribbons for flexible packaging, and Magnetic Ink Character Recognition (MICR) products. Over the years, our relentless dedication has resulted in delivering more than 17 million exceptional image products at competitive prices to satisfied customers across the globe, thus establishing us as the foremost Thermal Transfer Ribbon Converter in the Southeast Asia region.

At Transam Industries, we take immense pride in our proven track record, which has earned us the trust and loyalty of customers worldwide. Our clients rely on us to cater to their diverse thermal printing needs. From flexible packaging solutions to precise coding requirements and MICR applications, our products have demonstrated their versatility and reliability time and again.

Transam Industries is now a proud subsidiary of OVOL Singapore Pte Ltd, a reputable leader in the distribution of paper and print media. Being a part of the esteemed Japan Pulp and Paper Group further amplifies our capabilities and opens doors to enhanced possibilities for our customers and partners.
Location: Geylang, Central Singapore Community Development Council

Name: Freshening Industries Pte Ltd
Description:
More than 5,000 healthcare, food & beverage, and hospitality establishments in our portfolio of clients, developing thousands of private label and contract manufacturing products; Freshening is today Asia's leading manufacturer of wet wipes, disinfectants and other hygiene products, as well as a global OEM provider. 

Developing internationally but continue to stay close to our customers and their needs, Freshening has 3 manufacturing plants and 5 global offices in Singapore, Indonesia and China, Malaysia and Hong Kong, with its products found in more than 37 countries.

Name: SODA AROMATIC (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
Description:
SODA AROMATIC is a Japanese multinational manufacturer of flavors and fragrances. We, Soda Aromatic (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. (hereinafter called, "SAS") are distributing and creating our flavors and ingredients for the market in Southeast Asia. 

I. SODA PHILOSOPHY

"Creating better tomorrow with aroma technology."

II. SAS VISION

“SAS will be the professional of flavors and become a flavor house with a strong presence in Asia.”

1) Professional of flavors: As a professional of flavors, having a curiosity in food and food culture, we focus on designing and proposing flavors that the local people feel deliciousness. Also, the “professional” needs to create value and customer satisfaction for making our sustainable activity.

2) Strong presence in Asia: SODA has been expanding flavor businesses in Japan, China and Taiwan for many years. To be a flavor house with a strong presence in Asia, it is essential to expand business in Southeast Asia furthermore. To achieve the goal, SAS was established in Singapore as a joint venture company with SODA and our partner company in Singapore. SAS will be a center of sales, marketing and R&D in Southeast Asia.

Name: Dawood Flour Mill & Provision Pte Ltd
Description:
Manufacturer of all types of curry and spice powders, specialist in providing grinding, mixing and packing for all types of cereals, herbs and spices for retail, wholesale, and contract purposes. Importer of rice, oil and a whole range of spices and a wholesaler dealing in provision goods.

We have been in the spices and curry powder manufacturing business for over 30 years, and we are ISO 22000: 2018 certified with Halal Certification for our products.

Name: Lion Corporation (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1891, Lion Corporation Japan produces and markets innovative products that offer maximum value to both consumer and industrial users. Lion's wide-ranging consumer products encompass toothpastes, toothbrushes, cosmetics, soaps, shampoos, rinses, laundry detergents, dishwashing detergents, household cleaners, as well as pharmaceutical and food products. All of these products enjoy high brand awareness and major shares in their respective markets. In the industrial sector, Lion has built an enviable reputation as a producer of high-performance chemicals, used daily in a diverse array of industries. 

Lion Corporation Singapore Pte Ltd is a wholly owned subsidiary of Lion Corporation Japan. Since its inception in 1982, Lion Singapore has marketed a wide range of successful brands and products such as Mama Lemon, Top, Essence, Shokubutsu, Kirei Kirei, Kodomo and Systema.

Name: Ngo Chew Hong Edible Oil Pte Ltd
Description:
As a member under MEWAH group of companies with 10 manufacturing facilities (including 4 Refineries, 3 Packing Plants, 1 Dairy Manufacturing Plant,  1 Packaging Processing Plant and 1 Biodiesel Plant), Ngo Chew Hong Edible Oil Pte Ltd is one of the leading edible oils & fats manufacturers in the world.
 
Our long standing reputation is built from our heritage of over 60 years history, with expertise spans from oil refining, oil packaging, can making, logistics, warehousing and distribution to serve the distinctive needs of each valued customer.

We offer a comprehensive range of quality products – ranging from palm based vegetable cooking oils, vegetable ghee, soft oils, lauric oils, to bakery and confectionery fats, etc.  Ever aware of the changing needs of our clientele, we have also extended our product range to other foods and beverages categories i.e. rice, condensed milk, tomato paste, savoury premixes, and home & personal care products i.e. soap, detergent powder, etc. 

Our flagship brand, OKI, and several other leading brands such as Turkey, Mona and Dukes have achieved high level of global awareness with strong distributed network. 
 
Today, our business crosses 5 continents with a global customer base that spans over 100 countries in Africa, Asia Pacific, the CIS, Europe, Middle East and the Indian subcontinent.

Name: QAF Limited
Description: QAF is a leading multi-industry food company with core businesses in Bakery, and Distribution and Warehousing. We have an extensive operations and distribution network across the Asia-Pacific region including Singapore, Malaysia, the Philippines, Australia, Myanmar, Cambodia, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Macau, Brunei, Indonesia, Vietnam, Laos and Bangladesh. We employ more than 9,000 people regionally and are listed on the Singapore Exchange.

Name: SMH Food Group
Description:
MAKING QUALITY DIM SUM FOR THE WORLD TO ENJOY!

For more than 60 years, family-run SMH has been serving Singapore and the world with tradition, heritage, comfort and happiness. Our whole heart goes into preparing our dim sums. When you take a bite of our dim sum, you can be assured it is more than just good ingredients that went into making it. Every delectable piece of dim sum contains years of experience and dedication; each bite is a taste of heritage and passion.

SMH Food is the frontrunner in providing gourmet dim sum to 5 star-hotels, caterers and restaurants. Our manufacturing facility is endorsed with ISO 22000 and HACCP standards, and is Halal certified. Today, we produce more than 300 types of quality Dim Sums for the HORECA industry that are enjoyed in more than 20 countries. 

With SMH curated ready-to-heat retail series, consumers can now enjoy restaurant quality SMH dim sums with family and friends in the convenience and comfort of their own home. From the essential classics, to innovative trending bites, there’s always ‘sum thing for everyone!

Name: Good Dog People
Description:
At Good Dog People, it’s always dogs, people and planet first. We endeavour to provide responsible products and services that enrich and empower lives of dogs and people.

Website: gooddogpeople.com
Dircections: https://www.google.com/maps?cid=509233163894810669

Name: Silversky - Delivering WOW!
Description:
The Silversky’s Vision – Delivering WOW!
With more than a decade of experience in the pet’s industry in Singapore, Silversky is an established player in the pets’ market, acting as a true distribution leader for natural, premium pet food and supplies in Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia. At Silversky, we love pets, and we are obsessed with delivering the best to pets and pet parents, and our esteemed business partners, hence Delivering WOW! This long term vision impacts everything that we do – bringing value from distribution, to the end-consumers.

Silversky currently handles more than 20 international pet brands – and up to date, we are servicing more than 230 pet retailers and online stores in Singapore alone.

The Silversky Mission – To Deliver The Best to Pets and Pet Parents
We are passionate to bring the best to pets and pet parents. We work together with international pet brands to deliver only the best pet products in the market. Our impeccable reputation is built upon by keeping the mission close to our hearts; doing business with uncompromising values of integrity, care and the highest level of professionalism.

Name: Eco-Agri Group for Acacia Gum & Starches
Description:
Acacia Gum has deep-rooted origins in Sudan, dating back to the centuries… 
historically been a trusted provider of Gum Arabic for various industries, including Food & Beverage, Pharmaceutical, Confectionary, Nutrition, and Cosmetics. With unwavering commitment and pride, it has established itself as one of the foremost global leaders in the Gum Arabic market.

Looking ahead, we are poised to Redefine Gum Arabic through increased support for research and development (R&D), as well as the creation of novel applications, products, and processes.

Name: The Urban Spice Shop
Description:
The Urban Spice Shop was established in 2017 with the intention of providing customers with high quality organic spices sourced from various parts of the world. The company currently has offices in Singapore and Sri Lanka.

We currently serve clients in the food service channel and have products and formats suitable for restaurants and hotels.

The Urban Spice Shop strives to bring the best out of the spices we serve, tantalizing your senses and enhancing your culinary experience. All our spices are carefully sourced and hand packed, ensuring that the natural flavor and freshness is guaranteed.

Name: Mottainai Food Tech
Description: We aim to create solutions for as many food processing by-products. Turning excess to excellence.

Name: Love Handle SG
Description:
Love Handle is Asia's first plant-based butcher with the largest curation of plant-based meats, dairy's and condiments. We’re on a mission to deliver flavour that’s good for the planet; or in other words, plant-based deliciousness created to satiate meatlovers. 

Begin your Love Handle journey at our butcher. Divided into 3 sections - Raw, Marinated & Prepared, and Condiments/Non-dairy - we offer an authentic cut, weigh, and package experience just like the butchers you’ve always known. Key highlights include sausage patties & minced chicken, brisket & “beef” wellington, and housemade kombu butter & XO sauce. Have we got your mouth watering yet? Make your way upstairs to get a taste for yourself, where we use our meats to create flavour-packed burgers and mains. The top floor is where all the behind-the-scenes magic happens. Home to our very own innovation hub, the Love Handle team spends hours here experimenting on new ways and recipes to grow the plant-based industry.

Online or in-store, we’re here to bring you food like you’ve never known before, and to be your pal with fun collabs, experiences, and a content hub full of recipes.

Name: Shake Salad
Description:
At Shake Salad, we believe eating well should be simple and enjoyable. 

Freshness, balance, and great taste are at our core, because caring for yourself shouldn’t feel like a chore.

Our mission: Make nutritious food easy, affordable, and exciting. From quick bites to full meals, Shake Salad fuels your day with better choices that fit modern life.

Name: S M C Nutrition Pte. Ltd.
Description:
S M C Nutrition is established in 2013 as a wholly owned subsidiary of S M C Food 21 Pte. Ltd., to focus on the Research, Development and Manufacturing of Infant and Adult nutritional and functional products for the ASEAN markets.

S M C Nutrition is approved by Agri-Food and Veterinary Authority of Singapore for infant formula and Adult nutritional formula manufacturing. As a testimony of its pursuit for excellence, it has attained FSC22000, HACCP (CCIC) and “A” grading over the past years. 
At S M C Nutrition, we understand that Quality is perhaps the most important criteria when it comes to your products and your customers. This is why at S M C Nutrition, we are relentless in our pursuit for the highest quality standards in our environment and processes. 

Featuring a manufacturing environments that are certified class 100 and 1,000 and a highly advanced integrated laboratory that is able to provide in-house chemical, microbiological and physical analysis and testing, the quality of each and every product from our plant are always assured of.

Name: Blue Waves
Description:
We are a collective of passionate individuals unified within the indistinguishable desire of sharing true authentic delicacies to the world.

Blue Waves is a dedicated food and beverage company that aims to create an innovative and sustainable business model with products and services that are of fine quality and value. Currently operating restaurants and bars in Singapore and Indonesia  – the Group is constantly on the lookout for exciting new F&B ideas to develop and innovate for customers, both locally and globally.

Singapore:
• Baristsart Coffee Singapore baristartcoffee.sg
• Rumours Beach Club rumoursbeach.club

Name: Little Blossom
Description: Little Blossom is an organic baby food brand, created for parents looking for healthier options for their little ones. Our newest range of organic brown rice puffs are all natural, made with organic ingredients and contain no added sugar, salt or preservatives

Name: Indoguna
Description: Importer & Supplier

Name: EB Food Marketing Pte Ltd
Description:
Everbest Group of companies’ humble beginning started in 1995. We’re an integrated company that mainly specializes in the distribution of soybean-based products. Ranging from bean curd skin, yuba, and vegetarian series. In 2015, a new subsidiary company, EB Food Marketing Pte Ltd has established which focus on frozen food distribution.

As the sole distributor of Everbest Group, EB Food offers fresh and tantalizing frozen food products that come in 6 different series: Hotpot, Finger Food, Dim Sum, Western Food, Japanese and Oceanic to fulfil local demands while catering for every occasion. In Singapore, we channel our products mainly through hypermarkets, foodservice and retail outlets for easily accessible to our customers.

Name: Rheem Asia
Description:
A History of Comfort:

Brothers Richard and Donald Rheem founded Rheem Manufacturing Company in Emeryville, CA, in 1925. While the company has produced a number of products in its nearly 100 years of operation, Rheem is currently the only manufacturer in the world that produces heating, cooling, water heating, pool & spa heating and commercial refrigeration products, and it is the largest manufacturer of water heating products in North America.

Award-Winning Innovations:

From industry-leading technologies to next-generation energy efficiencies, Rheem has been a pioneer in developing some of the most innovative advancements in heating, cooling and water heating. With a long list of award-winning solutions, Rheem continues to deliver advanced comfort, savings and experiences to our customers—just as we’ve done for nearly 100 years.

A Trusted Family of Brands:

Both in the US and abroad, innovative products from the Rheem family of brands lead the industries they serve. To maintain our leadership position—regardless of the brand badge affixed to them—our products must always be unique in the marketplace, relevant to our customers’ lifestyles, and authentic to our company’s values.

Name: ADEKA Singapore
Description:
Manufacturers of frying oil, shortening, margarine, frozen dough, taste sheets, mayonnaise products. 

Frying oil:
Our refined processed vegetable oils feature a great safety from oxidation. Foods fried with the oil stay fresh for prolonged periods.Moreover, the light and plain taste of the oils bring out the natural flavours of ingredients. The clean, light flavour makes fried foods including bread, donuts, snacks, appetizers, tempura, tonkatsu, and varieties of cooking, taste better than ever before.

Shortening:
Our fine vegetable fat shortening products are designed for various applications, suit each intended use, including cake, bread, cookies, biscuits, fats for chocolate and so on. Reliable Quality as well as wide assortment of products are the pride of RISU BRAND.

Margarine:
RISU BRAND margarines are supported overwhelmingly by food professionals, bring out the best quality in your creations. We have two types of margarine, use pure vegetable oils and fats, or high-class fresh butter contains, which both available in sheet and box size. Some of our margarine products are additive free of emulsifier, color and salt.

Sheet type margarines are perfect to create gourmet croissant, Danish pastries and pies.

Block type margarines are great kneading margarine for making breads and cookies.

Frozen Dough:
Our diverse type and size of high quality frozen dough, bakes up light and flaky, excellent ability to create puffs.

Taste Sheet:
(Chocolate, Custard, Coffee)
Excellent cream sheets for roll-in and filling use, perfect to create tasteful layer breads.

Mayonnaise:
Baking Mayonnaise - Designed for baking. High egg content, when baked it retains its shape and has a great baked appearance and flavor.

Restaurant Jas Mayonnaise - Mild, fresh handmade taste. Use for a wide variety of foods, including sandwiches, salads, deep-fried items and meuniere-style items.

Name: Nut Culture
Description:
Nut Culture is a Plant Based Food Company founded in Singapore. 

We are committed to crafting the finest artisanal vegan cheeses. Our cheese is made from organic nuts, fermented and aged to perfection.

Name: JR GROUP SINGAPORE
Description:
Innovative and always forward-looking - JR Group serves both the B2B and B2C market through its extensive range of ready-to-eat and ready-to-cook solutions. With our meal solutions prepared by chefs, and containing no artificial additives nor preservatives, we are constantly creating and innovating to meet the changing needs of today's society. 

We are also a leading contract manufacturer of quality food products for international chain restaurants, hotels and retail stores.

Never go hungry with the Chef-in-Box range of frozen ready-to-eat meals - these meals are perfect for busy days and late-night hunger pangs.

Chef-in-Box Vendcafés dotted around the island provide hot meals, drinks and snacks to our customers round the clock. Visit www.chefinbox.com.sg for more information.

Name: Klenco (Singapore) Pte Ltd
Description: Established in 1971, Klenco is the leading independent distributor and now a manufacturer as well, providing the most comprehensive scope of professional and industrial cleaning and maintenance machinery, accessories and chemicals. Klenco’s reliable products are extensively used in ASEAN, CHINA, SOUTH ASIA, and are also sold in the MIDDLE EAST and EUROPE. As one of the region’s most comprehensive independent distributors of cleaning related equipment, Klenco offers a wide portfolio of products which have proven reliability and quality in the market. We have been serving the needs of diverse customers with high quality products at reasonable prices and a high standard of service and support. Our product range covers the general and commercial sectors and also industrial and specialised sectors, contributing to enhance environmental and health standards. Staring with a small selection of cleaning machines and chemicals sold only in Singapore in the early years, Klenco’s products has increased to be the most comprehensive range in the industry. They are sold throughout the region and are generally grouped under 2 distinct divisions.

Name: Hawkr
Description:
If you're reading this, you're probably a stressed out working professional. We hope to make your workday or company events more homey by bringing homemade meals to your workplace.

With that, welcome to Hawkr. We're a platform for homemade food delivery based in Singapore and Klang Valley. Imagine a world where you can experience the best Nasi Briyani made by an aunty in your apartment block, or artisan kombucha made by your bro next door, all in one platform. Despite being the bedrock of Singaporean and Malaysian food culture, home businesses don't always get the visibility and support they deserve and we want to change that.

We believe you'll get the best culinary experience in your own neighborhood. We also believe that anybody should be able to start an F&B brand from a simple home kitchen. Above all, we believe homemade food brings communities closer. That's why we started Hawkr. We hope you'll feel right at home here!

-Team Hawkr

Name: P.L. Global Impex Pte. Ltd.
Description:
PL Global stands as a beacon in the international trade landscape, facilitating the import and export of critical commodities like beans, pulses, alongside a comprehensive range of FMCG products and pharmaceutical supplies. 

Our operations span across the globe, reinforcing our commitment to enhancing human life and ensuring consumer satisfaction through quality and innovation.
As the umbrella organisation for varied ventures, including the well-regarded Vimpex and RP Comtrade, PL Global showcases a dynamic approach to business, adapting swiftly to market demands and consumer preferences. 

Our dedication to sustainability, efficiency, and reliability drives our mission to contribute positively to global nourishment and healthcare.

For partnership inquiries or to explore our diverse business portfolio, reach out to us. Join us on our journey to create a healthier, well-provisioned world.

Name: HCS Scientific & Chemical Pte Ltd
Description: With over 30 years of expertise in the chemical and reagent industry, HCS stands as a trusted Singapore-based Scientific & Laboratory Equipment provider. Our robust Reactivo manufacturing capabilities in Singapore enable us to ensure uninterrupted supply to our customers even amid global supply disruptions. Our dedicated team provides comprehensive solutions for various industries including Petrochemical, Pharmaceutical, Chemical, Food, Environmental, Institution Research & Development, Paint & Coating, Testing Laboratories, Government, Manufacturing & Engineering, Flavour & Fragrance, Medical, Aviation & Aerospace.

Name: Direct Wholesale Pte Ltd
Description:
Direct Wholesale is Sg's / Dubai  Online Wholesaler for FMCG :With over 6000 Skus in Food and Beverages, Health and Beauty ,Baby Needs and Household & Office Essentials we see our self as a wholesale supermarket  .
We aspire to be a distributor of the future we understand that effectively engaging customers demands true innovation in executing the value chain. Traditional approaches to inventory, logistics, pricing, rebates, and network is being re imagined through the application of advanced analytics and technological innovations.
 
DW has aspirations to Transform the Wholesale Trade . 
Our mission is deeply rooted in Price Transparency ,Quality & Variety and Key Product Information ,Seamless Ordering ,Customer Experience and Efficient Logistics - all wholesale community driven values and managed with the best that technology has to offer.

Our simple platform offers the best variety of quality products from the world's leading brands and products from new aspiring start ups at the best possible price.

Direct Wholesale has at the heart of its ecosystem - the Empowerment of Brand owners or Distributors and Bulk Buyers and Wholesalers . For bulk buyers, DirectWholesale democratizes product access and unlocks higher margins. For brands, it offers wider reach, control and unlimited scale.
For Niche Brands, here is an opportunity to unleash your potential without expensive marketing and distribution costs .Buyers and Suppliers now have a unique opportunity to disrupt and change the traditional wholesale trade.
DW is an effective online wholesaler that will transform the traditional distribution value proposition with a relentless focus on engaging the supplier and customer while executing the value chain, and energizing the business .

Name: Universal Aquaculture Singapore
Description:
Universal aquaculture was founded in 2020 by a team of Aquaculture enthusiasts, with combined experience of 30 years in the Aquaculture industry. Our mission is to build the global food systems of tomorrow, using environmentally sound and sustainable food production methods. 

Our focus is on the intensive production of tilapia and vannamei, in a fully controlled indoor environment using our industry-leading poly-culture hybrid re-circulating Aquaculture system with bio-floc technology.

Name: Golden Bridge Foods Manufacturing Pte Ltd
Description:
Helmed by a team of visionaries, who has been in the industry for more than 20 years. Golden Bridge Foods Manufacturing Pte Ltd has evolved from a small company to a regional powerhouse with total staff strength of more than 100 people.

 
From challenging ourselves to improve our recipes, to looking into technology innovations to enhance efficiency and quality, we pride ourselves on our drive to constantly reinvent ourselves, and our tenacity to help our clients grow their business.

We will never say “no” to helping our clients find a solution to their needs, no matter how challenging they are.

At Golden Bridge Foods, what drives us forward is our ethos, which is to continually deliver excellence by staying customer-focused and scaling new standards.

Name: CREMER Sustainable Foods
Description: OEM plant-based

Name: Super Food Ingredients
Description:
Super Food Ingredients is one of the leading product innovator and manufacturer in Southeast Asia. We work in partnership with multinational F&B manufacturing and food-service companies, as well as hotels, restaurants and cafes ("HORECA") to create tailored products suitable for the F&B industry and markets. Super Food Ingredients aims to be a premier food ingredients specialist, capable of delivering quality and consistent food ingredients to serve the regional marketplace. 

Our core technological strengths in manufacturing non-dairy creamer (NDC), soluble coffee powder, cereal flakes and botanical herbal extracts to our strength in research and development, we’re able to create a diverse range of F&B products for our customers. To ensure that only the best ingredients are selected, stringent quality control occurs at every part of the production process. 

At Super, we work together to create customised solutions for all our customers. We also work closely with our in-house research and development units to inform, advise and collaborate with each customer on how to apply our food ingredients into their new or existing F&B products. Processed under highly controlled environments, our ingredients retain their flavours which have kept our partners satisfied for years.

Innovation, improvement and customisation, this multi-faceted approach enables us to derive the best from our core expertise, selection and manufacturing capabilities.

Name: Dixon Singapore
Description:
Dixon Singapore is a premier manufacturer and supplier of material transfer products, across a wide range of markets – mining, oil & gas, industry, marine, fire protection, food & beverage, irrigation and petrochemical.

Dixon is committed to being the easiest company to do business with and has an unsurpassed reputation of producing safe and leak free products for more than 100 years.  Founded by Howard W Goodall in 1916 through visiting construction sites, Howard identified their hose and coupling requirements and started manufacturing purpose-built product solutions.  Headquartered in Chestertown, Maryland in the United States of America, Dixon has grown to be a leading innovator in the hose coupling industry.

With sales and distribution centres in  Singapore, China & Australia, Dixon utilises its application based knowledge and current technologies to create products to solve challenges across a wide range of material transfer applications. 

Dixon Singapore is focused on providing value add services, superior customer service, technical support and training; ensuring its customers can connect with the right parts just at the right time.

Name: Superlative Foods
Description: Superlative Foods is Singapore's only EU and USDA organic-certified manufacturer of delicious snacks and awesome foodservice products and the proud supplier to airlines, catering firms, organic food retailers, grocery chains, commercial kitchens, 5 star hotels, restaurants and beverage manufacturers.

Name: Sinochem International Oil (Singapore) Pte Ltd
Description:
Sinochem Corporation is a leading integrated operator in oil and chemical industry, providing agricultural inputs (seeds, agrochemicals and fertilizers) and modern agricultural services, and exerting strong influence in city operation and non-banking financial service sector. 
Sinochem International Oil (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., established in August 1990, is one of the important international business platforms for oil trading of Sinochem Corporation.

Name: Belly Empire
Description:
Here at Belly Empire, we strive to discover timeless cuisines and present them to the everyday man with a modern twist. Powered by our shared love for truly delicious food, we have set out on a journey to bring great food to the masses, because we believe that good food tastes even better when shared. Partnering with FoodKing’s Ryan Tan, we round up the best heritage-rich recipes plate up and share with the world. 

Brands Under Management: 
Xin Mei Xiang Zheng Zong Lor Mee 新美香正宗卤麵

Name: HDC LED DISPLAY ASIA PTE LTD
Description: Illuminating the city with LED technology | LED display manufacturer

Name: Oh My Goodness!
Description:
Oh My Goodness! is a small food company in Singapore with a big vision – a vision to make GOOD gluten-free, dairy-free and refined sugar-free food for the whole table 
more available, accessible and affordable across Asia Pacific
to serve those suffering from food allergies and sensitivities in the region.
Or those who simply wish to eat better.

A 2017 recipient of the VentureforGood grant, Oh My Goodness! is a social enterprise and member of raiSE, the Singapore Centre for Social Enterprise. Its operations team is staffed exclusively by disadvantaged individuals including low income women, ex-offenders and persons with intellectual disabilities (PWIDs).

Name: Asian Blending
Description:
Asian Blending provides blending and packing capabilities to major food companies around Asia, many of whose products you probably enjoy on a regular basis.

Asian Blending is a scrupulously managed and hermetically sealed operation, that provides a pristine and protected environment for the precision blending of various powdered products to make both ingredients for food and drink production and for final consumer products.

Asian Blending offers computer-controlled accuracy of blends and has historically excelled in all Government and customer audits achieving an AVA “A” Grade rating.

Dry blending in a “red-line” environment
High accuracy, Highest food-safety standards and protocols, Highly automated, Low human intervention

White and Dark blends, Milk Powder , 3-1 Coffee, Premix drinks
Sugar, Dairy, Cocoa, Coffee, Tea, Salt, non-dairy creamer, flavours, vitamins 

Full range of packaging sizes and formats
Bulk bags (500 to 1,000 kg), paper bags with strippable outer (25-30kg), Pouches (100g to 3kg)
Sticks and Sachets (14g-30g), Gas flushing, Heat sealing capability.

Services: Industrial, Food Service, Retail packing and Blending

Asian Blending is a wholly-owned subsidiary of SIS ’88 Pte Ltd and is based on the SIS site in Singapore.

Name: Jonite
Description:
With over 25 years of experience, Jonite is your partner in hardscape design. 

Since 1994, many clients have specified our reinforced decorative stone gratings for their beauty and unparalleled load-bearing performance, bringing their transformational design visions to life.

Jonite presents endless possibilities in solving architectural problems with innovative applications.

Designs on Jonite products can be tailor-made to suit any application for any environment, empowering architects to make bold and imaginative statements.

A vast range of products in various architectural, site construction, and industrial applications such as cladding, bollards, street furniture, containment, and external feature walls can be achieved.

Why Jonite?
 Elegant Stone Aesthetics
 Durable
 Slip Resistant
 Sustainable
 High Performing Properties
 Theft Resistant

Jonite products and designs come in a wide range of engaging collections to bring a fresh vision to hardscapes and interiors, transforming ordinary surroundings into a unique expression that celebrates creativity and passion. 

All Jonite products can be tailor-made to suit any application for any environment, empowering architects to make bold and imaginative statements.

Check out our past projects here: https://www.jonite.com/projects/

Name: Monarda
Description:
We take immense pride in our contribution to food security and economic growth in the markets we serve. We buy at source and sell to where the consumer is. We believe in creating global efficiencies by managing a complex supply chain from end to end.

Literally rooted in the land, our business philosophy supports sustainable growth. From creating enabling environments for communities to sourcing responsibly, Monarda envisions a future where economic growth sustains the environment. Not just the other way around.

Name: GoldKili Trading Enterprise Ptd Ltd
Description:
GoldKili embodies over two decades of great tasting instant beverages. Started in 1985 as a local coffee powder manufacturer and distributor. Over the years, we have been tirelessly generating an on-going series of innovative instant beverages that are not only of the utmost quality, but also novel, enticing and extremely appealing to all our consumers, both locally and globally. 

We continuously invest in proprietary, hygienic and modern manufacturing process to preserve the fresh taste and flavour of the natural ingredients used for all our instant beverages. At GoldKili, we insist on stringent quality control at every stage of the manufacturing process.

What sets us apart from others?
- We put you, the consumer, as our top priority in all our product development, aiming to satisfy the diverse preferences of different export markets. Consistency, reliability and an impressive array of delectable instant beverages sets the company a notch above the rest. 

Our mission is to maintain high standards in product development, taste and presentation.
Our vision is to be readily identified by all consumers for our great tasting instant beverages.

Certifications:
 ISO 22000 Certification 
 British Retail Consortium Certification (BRC)
 HACCP & Halal Certification

Name: The Boralis Group
Description:
The Boralis Group brings together collaborative industry experts with a unique combination of practical domain knowledge, diverse operational experience and deep industry networks, specifically aimed at addressing scaled, sustainable food supply. 

We have two core areas of focus;
1. Food Systems:
Scaling integration of complex (Hyperlocal Intensive Urban and Extensive Regional) sustainable food production bases and supply chains. Includes focus around carbon/water asset footprint, animal welfare, production and processing, food & feed innovation, supply chain digitisation and circular economy/waste. In Singapore this aims to support 30by30 expansion plans in production efficiency and scaling. 

2. Growth Services:
Support for companies scaling NED (novel, enabling and disruptive) solutions in upstream food and feed production (e.g. process innovation, feedstock innovation, novel chemistry, genetics, plant nutrition and water management) and processing that specifically support scaling of Food Systems. Together with M&A partners, we support portfolio strategy, market entry, commercial offtake agreements and securing growth capital with investors.

Our approach combines a balance of strategy and execution - connecting innovators, investors and industry to drive results.  Boots on the ground, sleeves rolled up, hands in the dirt, getting stuff done.

We have offices in Sydney and Singapore.

Name: Mr. Coconut (椰子鲜生)
Description: Mr. Coconut is a Singapore’s brand which is well-known for its coconut-based beverages.

Name: Kee Song Food Corporation (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
Set up in 1987, Kee Song started by selling chickens to wet market vendors. Gradually, we widened our circle of vendors to include top hotels and restaurants in Singapore.

A leading poultry producer in Singapore and Malaysia today, Kee Song Group owns several farms to meet the increasing demands of our clients around the region. Besides rearing chickens, we also handle the processing, packaging and distribution of fresh chilled and frozen poultry. 

Over the years, we started embracing innovative farming techniques, in the hope of giving our consumers more significant health benefits.

In 2005, Kee Song brought Japanese lactobacillus farming technology into our rearing method for our Sakura Chickens, which have tenderer and lower fat chicken meat. This method won us the Merit for Innovation Award (2009-2011) from Singapore Institute of Food Science and Technology.

Name: Eligo Pte Ltd
Description:
We are a distributor for a range of high quality inter-complementary industrial products, especially relating to mission-critical fluid delivery systems for industries like oil & gas, petrochemical, marine & offshore, FPSO, semiconductor, power & energy, pharmaceutical, water treatment, food & beverage, reactor & heat exchanger.  Valves, fittings, tubings & pressure regulators are just some of the products we carry.  We are currently the biggest Parker distributor/stockist in ASEAN. We aim to provide innovative customized unrivalled level of integrated service for our partners & customers.

Having collectively 50 years of experience, our sales team can give you what you need – good quality product at the lowest possible cost.

Name: BLU Ventures Holdings Pte. Ltd.
Description:
WE ARE WHOLESALE SPECIALISTS IN FRESH AND FROZEN SEAFOOD
BLU Ventures controls a substantial part of the seafood supply chain with its subsidiaries handling imports, exports, trading and retail services. Through our house brands Fresh BLU and Fishop, we sell quality catch and processed products from around the world to food service providers and consumers. We also hold exclusive distribution rights in Singapore to some of the world’s finest food products, such as Conservas DANI’s range of Spanish spices and condiments, Man Shun Cheong’s ready-to-eat mini braised abalone created specially by a renowned chef in Hong Kong, and Yole’s no-sugar-added frozen yogurt.

The company continues to seize the opportunities presented by rising consumer affluence, sustainable living and the quest for good life.

Name: Osmo Singapore Pte Ltd
Description:
Osmo Singapore Pte Ltd | Natural Wood Coatings for Tropical and Coastal Environments

Osmo Singapore represents Osmo Germany across key international markets, delivering premium natural wood coatings engineered for tropical, coastal, and high-exposure environments.

We proudly manage operations in Singapore, Malaysia, the Maldives, Sri Lanka, Mauritius, Seychelles, and Saudi Arabia, regions where intense humidity, UV exposure, and marine climates demand the highest performance in wood protection.

Specializing in both residential and commercial projects, we provide solutions that enhance, protect, and preserve the natural beauty of wood without sealing its character ensuring long-term durability, even under the toughest conditions.

Our Expertise Includes:
	•	Interior Wood Finishes (Flooring, Furniture, Walls, Ceilings)
	•	Exterior Wood Protection (Decking, Cladding, Outdoor Structures)
	•	Resort, Hospitality, and High-Exposure Project Solutions
	•	Specialist Coatings for Coastal, Marine, and Desert Environments

By combining German innovation with deep expertise in extreme climates, Osmo Singapore is trusted by architects, developers, contractors, and homeowners across diverse and demanding markets.

Naturally Better. Engineered for Excellence in Every Environment.

Name: Pan Ocean Singapore Pte Ltd
Description:
Before our establishment in 1992, we were just a small store in the dry market selling fresh seafood. From there, Pan Ocean has grown from a small trading company to a well-established and well recognized trustworthy international trading house with integrated seafood processing factories in China, Indonesia and fishery products collecting stations all over Asa.

To keep pace with digital wave Pan Ocean has embarked on an exciting journey of digital transformation through leveraging the power of e-commerce and social media.

After years of self-improvement and development, our group of experienced and professional management teams and production staff guarantee highly efficient services, premium quality products and of course competitive prices. Removing the need to source and engage multiple suppliers, we provide our customer with a one-stop solution for their seafood needs.

Name: Walson Food Distributor Pte Ltd
Description:
Walson Food Distributor Pte Ltd is a company based in Singapore and stationed in Tampines.

Established in 1998, Walson Food Distributor Pte Ltd is amongst Singapore's top foodservice companies in distributing a wide array of confectionery, food products and beverages to diverse business units that include F&B and hospitality establishments, wholesale, and export. Walson Food Distributor Pte Ltd is also one of the appointed main distributor in the foodservice sector for well known brands such as Nestle, Dilmah, Haribo, Bebeto, Cloversoft.

Walson Food Distributor Pte Ltd is a trusted distributor backed by our mark of committed service and reliable deliveries. Walson Food Distributor Pte Ltd is certified with the Singapore SS 590: 2013 HACCP-based Food Safety Management for shelf-stable food , chilled and frozen products.

Name: Grain Traders
Description: Grain Traders is a good food company that believes in nourishing people beyond meals. We serve inspired and consciously-prepared meals, ready for enjoyment. Using slow, intentional processes and professional techniques that bring out culture you can taste. In engaging environments where food meets design, music and art, and meaningful locations that serve diverse, global communities.

Name: Greenday FMCG Singapore Pte Ltd.
Description: At Greenday FMCG Singapore Pte Ltd, we are passionate about creating delicious food and beverages. Our product range includes a wide variety of breakfast cereals, juices, energy drinks, coffee, and more. Greenday stands for quality, innovation, and integrity. Our enthusiastic team in Singapore, Vietnam, UAE, Philippines, and Sri Lanka strives to exceed expectations in good food choices, better livelihoods, and sustainable growth. Choose GREENDAY and experience the difference in quality, taste, and commitment to excellence.

Name: Seamaster Holdings
Description: Seamaster Paint is a leading paint manufacturers with origins stretching back more than 60 years. From a small establishment in Singapore, it has grown to become the pioneer in commercial and industrial paint manufacturing in the region with exports to over 40 countries around the world. It is the 1st paint manufacturer in Singapore to be awarded the prestigious ISO 9002 certificate of quality, cohesively through strictly controlled manufacturing process that ensures the highest product quality.

Name: You Tiao Man
Description:
You Tiao Man transformed from a hawker business into a manufacturing brand, which grew to become one of Singapore's biggest You Tiao manufacturers - serving Hotels, Caterers, Restaurants, Cafes and Hawkers. 

With the goal of making traditional food accessible, You Tiao Man has expanded into B2C markets -supplying directly to consumers online and in over 100 supermarkets island-wide. 

You Tiao Man is Halal-certified, a Tasty Singapore ambassador and was recently one of the 64 recipients to be awarded the Made With Passion brand mark in 2021. Spearheaded by Singapore Tourism Board and Enterprise Singapore, it celebrates brands who embody the Singapore spirit of turning possibilities into reality.

As a strong ambassador of upholding heritage and hawker culture, You Tiao Man reinvents tradition and makes traditional food relevant to young people. Certified with the “Healthier Choice” symbol by Health Promotion Board, Singapore’s first Wholegrain You Tiao is a popular alternative among the young and health conscious Singaporeans. 

You Tiao Man is a well-loved brand that inspires Singaporean and other young people to have the courage to embrace change, display resilience and achieve the “Singapore dream”.

Name: Really Addictive Drinks
Description:
RAD. is a custom and bespoke drinks production company dedicated to serving brands across the spectrum, from hotels, caterers, restaurants, events, and more.

Dissatisfied with the mundane and overly complicated state of the beverage industry here in Singapore, we aim to make great drinks accessible to all. 

We bring together all that is needed for drinks creation into one place, empowering individuals and businesses to launch their own exceptional beverages regardless of their industry and experience level.

Guided by our principles of bold, persistent innovation and unwavering support, we treat your challenges as our own. We are committed to acting as your own dedicated beverage arm to develop the most impactful solutions.

Join us to redefine what's possible with drinks, and let's supercharge your food experience, complement themed events, mark milestones, inspire new conversations, and explore new cultures and flavours together.

Get started at create@reallyaddictivedrinks.com

Name: Regency Steel Asia Pte Ltd
Description:
Regency Steel Asia Pte Ltd is a trusted distributor and processor of reinforcing steel products, headquartered in Singapore. We serve both domestic and international markets across the construction and infrastructure sectors.

A subsidiary of Mitsui & Co. Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd., we draw on global resources, industry expertise, and a strong supply chain network to support our clients with reliable steel solutions.

We are recognized for our reliability, efficiency, and commitment to quality — delivering to schedule and to spec.
 Our core services include:
• Wholesale distribution of reinforcing steel products
• Global sourcing & supply chain solutions
• Processing: Cutting & bending of rebar to project specifications

Whether supporting high-rise developments or large-scale infrastructure, our steel is part of the foundation.

At Regency Steel Asia, we focus on long-term partnerships, operational excellence, and adding value at every stage.

 Based in Singapore | Serving Asia and beyond

Name: The Vintage Wine Club Pte Ltd
Description:
The Vintage Wine Club Pte Ltd is a Singaporean based company, specialized in fine wines import and wine services. 

- Private Sales : offering the best wines from France and all other countries at a very good price. Our exclusives partnerships with small winemakers were build over the last 8 years. 

- Wines Services : private wine tasting, team building for a company, start a wine collection, increase your sales at your restaurant, The Vintage Wine Club Pte Ltd helps you to achieve your goals.

Name: Austral Solutions
Description: Original Design Manufacturer (ODM), Joint Design Manufacturer (JDM), Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS). We provide comprehensive customer focused solutions. We specialise in product design, lean manufacturing and efficient supply chain management, delivering quality and innovation in every service we offer.

Name: Agua Foods
Description:
We are a true purpose-led business, feeding the world responsibly with maximum benefit for, and minimum footprint to, our planet and its inhabitants. 

Born in Singapore, we aim to use sustainable sources only to create tasty and affordable food. Our main objectives are:
1. Provide sustainable food sources, accessible to all levels of human society.
2. Be an innovator on plant based food manufacturing and a voice for more responsible consumption habits.
3. Minimize our manufacturing and logistic impact to our planet, while contributing profits to accomplish positive impact to our planet and all its inhabitants.
Help join us on our mission.

Name: Kwong Cheong Thye Pte Ltd
Description: Kwong Cheong Thye has been continuously innovating and improving, with rich tradition and vast experience in food manufacturing in Singapore. Our products are used by over 90% of the top hotels and restaurants in Singapore and widely distributed in more than 10 countries.

Name: Kim Guan Guan Coffee Trading Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1988, Kim Guan Guan Coffee (KGG) has its humble beginning in supplying Traditional Coffee Powder to local coffee shops. Building on the expertise garnered over more than 3 decades, KGG is now an integrated company that imports, roasts, packs, and supplies quality traditional coffee powder and tea dust to more than 1,000 F&B operators in Singapore.

KGG’s vision is to produce top-quality traditional coffee through continuous improvement in the manufacturing process with the mission to preserve and share the unique culture of traditional coffee in Singapore with one and all. 

To cater to the evolving requirements of end consumers, KGG has recently introduced Kim’s Duet, an innovative range of Local Steep Coffee and Tea that’s created with consumers’ health benefits as the priority. Kim’s Duet is committed to delivering healthy Traditional Coffee and Tea through quality ingredients and a lower sugar formula without compromising on the taste. These single-serve bags are perfect for those who are looking for an easy fuss-free way to enjoy an authentic cup of traditional kopi (coffee) or teh (tea) whenever, wherever. Simply STEEP and PRESS to enjoy your favourite brew in 3 Minutes!

Our products are Halal-certified and are proudly manufactured in Singapore at our own ISO22000-certified Roastery.

Name: Fossa Chocolate
Description:
Fossa Chocolate is a chocolate maker rooted in Singapore, with a vision to make every chocolate experience memorable. In our tiny factory, we craft bean-to-bar chocolate in small batches using thoughtfully sourced, fine cacao and ingredients. 

We work closely with farmers and artisanal producers, turning beautifully fermented and dried cacao beans into fine chocolate through a mix of traditional and unconventional techniques. Guided by our palates and inspired by the world around us, we strive to bring out the best interpretation for your enjoyment.

Name: brioLife
Description:
briolife is dedicated to the relentless pursuit of delivering wellness to our clients through premium products and innovative solutions. Our brands, brioHeal and brioPets, reflect our unwavering commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. We aim to provide the best wellness experience, enhancing the health and vitality of our clients with cutting-edge, research-backed products designed to support a holistic approach to well-being.

Our Brands:

- brioPets: Celebrate the joy of pet ownership with brioPets. Our range of nutritionally balanced pet food, engaging toys, and essential accessories are designed to ensure your pet's holistic health and happiness. Every product undergoes rigorous quality control to guarantee safety and effectiveness, making brioPets a trusted companion in your pet care journey.

- brioHeal: Elevate your well-being with brioHeal, our brand dedicated to human health. Offering a robust portfolio of supplements, wellness products, and health services, brioHeal combines cutting-edge research with advanced technology to promote optimal health and vitality. Our commitment to scientific excellence ensures that each product is innovative, reliable, and tailored to meet your wellness needs.

Our mission is to positively impact our clients' health journeys by offering exceptional service, support, and wellness solutions tailored to their unique needs. Join us in our pursuit of excellence and experience the transformative power of brioLife.

Name: The Meat Club
Description: The Meat Club connects you with the taste of Australia and New Zealand. We supply proteins and fresh produce at their true value, sourcing directly from trusted suppliers and delivering fresh to your doorstep. By cutting out unnecessary steps, we ensure no waste, just a responsible and conscious way to source high quality food. From world-class packing facilities to seamless delivery, we guarantee top-quality products every time.

Name: Singapore Food Manufacturers’ Association
Description:
Established in 1967, the Singapore Food Manufacturers’ Association (SFMA) is a professional and active trade association with more than 420 members.

Today, SFMA organises no less than 60 industry activities annually such as, monthly capability building workshops, lead overseas tradeshows, study and trade missions, supermarket promotions, local consumer food shows, as well as inter and cross industry networking and business matching sessions.

SFMA has also championed numerous industry initiatives which are aligned to the Food Manufacturing Industry Transformation Map, such as Food Innovation Product Award Competition, Singapore Food Gifts Initiative, the Singapore Food Expo & Asia Pacific Food Expo to help food manufacturers innovate, internationalise and create new channels for business growth.

Name: Protein Plus
Description:
Backed by a strong management team with vast experience in food production/manufacturing, Protein Plus has developed alternative sources of plant-based proteins, tapping on years of research and development expertise. Our unique plant extraction process ensures high yields, premium product quality and zero-waste production, tackling the modern-day challenges that we face.

Our ingredients, natural additives and substitutes allow you to be creative with products that are healthier, better tasting, with reduced costs yet delivering enhanced value, while serving premium quality and being environmentally responsible at every stage of production. 

Protein Plus is on a mission to build Singapore into a food manufacturing, research and development hub.

Name: Flomek Singapore Private Limited_FSPL.
Description: A leading pump manufacturer in Singapore, Flomek singapore offers services for industrial rotating equipment, water treatment, pumps, blowers, agitators, and compressors. The company specializes in rotating equipment and pump skid manufacturing. FSPL provides consulting services as well as designs, builds, installs, and commissions water and wastewater treatment facilities in addition to operating process plants, including maintenance and repair. Process plants, modular skids, pumping equipment, blowers, compressors, filter presses, pipes, valves, and skids are among the items we maintain. We trade and manufacture turnkey projects, overhaul industrial equipment, service and repair rotating equipment, and more by providing bespoke solutions and pump services.Quality and energy efficiency are our hallmarks that instills pride in us as a pioneer in manufacture of stainless steel submersible pumps and motors.

Name: H. L. Yong Company (Pte) Ltd
Description: H. L. Yong Company (Pte) Ltd is eponymous with our founder, Mr Ha Lian Yong who in the 1920's began his search for top-quality products from all around the world for sale to the Asian region. Mr Ha's daughter, Mdm Ha Niat Yin was then roped in to join the business, which grew from strength to strength and was eventually incorporated as a company in 1962 after having previously operated under sole proprietorship. After incorporation, H. L. Yong took on some big brand names such as S&W, Libbey, Kimberly Clark, Reynolds, Barilla, Campbells and sports brand Spalding. In line with the vision of our founder as a top Singaporean distributor, we are always on the lookout for quality products to introduce to the marketplace. Today, we are in our 4th generation of ownership, still distributing S&W, Libbey, and Reynolds, plus La Molisana, Iliada, Carmencita, Basic American Foods, and several others, and we look forward to many more years of serving you and your customers.

Name: Inter Rice Asia Pte Ltd
Description:
Japanese Sake has been the traditional drink of Japan for centuries. Many have enjoyed this national drink with its popular cuisine for the past decades. Singaporeans are all too familiar with it. However, there are many questions that need to be answered as its popularity grows. The typical questions are - Should I drink my sake hot or cold? How should I store my sake? How do I choose my sake?

Inter Rice Asia Pte Ltd entered the Singapore market in 2008 with the direction to promote sake, and to educate others on how to enjoy this amazing beverage. It imports directly from breweries in Japan, mainly in the Niigata prefecture, which prides itself to be "The Burgundy" region in Japan. Selected brands and types of premium sake are introduced to restaurants and pubs, giving a wider variety of options to the more discerning customers in Singapore. Private collectors of wine are beginning to also show interest in Japanese sake and learning how to enjoy the finer ones. 

Inter Rice Asia aims to educate and promote sake appreciation in Singapore and the nearby region.

Name: Durablinds
Description:
Living Spaces, Redefined.

Durablinds Trading Pte Ltd is a company dedicated to distributing and fabricating high-quality, durable products (Ziptrak and Glass Curtains). 

We bring our local expertise and combine that with the best innovations in home improvement around the globe to offer the best products that are locally relevant to the region.

Name: Singapore-Dine Pte Ltd
Description:
Singapore-Dine (www.Singapore-Dine.sg) is an advanced restaurants and dining web guide which aims to serve local Singaporeans and tourist.
Its uniqueness is an open platform for online reservations and an Augmented Reality application for restaurant location, the first Augemnted Reality application in Singapore!
Singapore-Dine offers it's users a "user friendly" restaurant search platform with up to date reviews.
Users can enjoy the wide variety of coupon offered, by restaurants, for free and enjoy Singapore-Dine's Food Delivery Service in only 1 hours time: http://www.singapore-dine.sg/food-delivery-singapore

Name: Tong Seng Produce Pte Ltd
Description:
"If food is the essence of man, then Rice is its  very being."

Tong Seng Produce Pte Ltd is Singapore’s leading rice importer and exporter, enriching lives with a trusted variety of daily staples. Since launching the SōngHè brand in 1990, we have remained committed to delivering fresh, safe, and high-quality rice that brings peace of mind to every meal.

As The Rice People, we are committed to preserving rice culture while evolving to meet diverse market needs — supplying rice, oil, sugar, flour, and fibre, supported by dependable service and tailored solutions for our partners.

Our Vision:
To become Singapore's premier rice importer and the foremost exporter of premium quality rice globally.

Our Mission:
To provide consumers quality rice that enriches their lives with a peace of mind whilst promoting the rice culture to future generations. 

Our Core Values:
Integrity
Responsibility
Discipline
Initiative

Name: DYNAMEAT
Description:
Dynamic Foodco’s TnT technology (Taste and Texture) transforms ordinary plant ingredients into sustainable food solution for the masses. The company’s technology
philosophy is not ingredient-centric but consumer-centric — so the ingredients used in the plant-based products are not static.

Singapore-based Dynamic Foodco is a food-technology company working to tackle food security issues in Singapore and beyond. Established in 2021, Dynamic Foodco leverages Dr. Andy Kusumo’s experience as the first scientist and R&D Head in Asia for Quorn, a pioneer in the alternative protein space; his prior stint at biopharma Merck and Amgen; and his chemical engineering degrees from Cornell University and Carnegie Mellon University, to push the boundaries of plant-based meat alternatives. 

The Dynamic Foodco team is backed by an advisory board comprised of food industry veterans to help scale the business.

Name: Everiday Foods
Description:
Brainchild of certified holistic nutritionist (NTP) and nomad, Ri Rupani, Everiday Foods is a range of clean, flavor-forward pantry staples that celebrate the flavors of the world and feeling great. 

Everiday Foods celebrates Ri’s heritage, the flavors of the world and feeling great. Whether they’re the foods we grew up with or foods we fell in love with, these comfortingly familiar flavours always bring a good time to the table.

Name: Limwood
Description:
Limwood, incorporated in 2018 and headquartered in Singapore, specialises in the import and distribution (Trade, Wholesale & Retail) of Food & Beverage Products from boutique gourmet producers around the world. 

Many of the passionate Producers we represent come from multi-generational, family-owned businesses and our vision is to enable them to continue creating incredible produce for many more years to come. 

Inspired by the discerning foodies and enthusiasts, every product sourced is personally curated to reflect our due care and attention to provenance and quality. From award-winning wineries, distilleries, breweries and farms, we are dedicated to sharing these wonderful artisanal “harvests” to fellow gourmands.

With a strong focus on providing informative and engaging knowledge to our customers, Limwood works hand-in-hand with our Producers to create content which depicts their brands' ethos, heritage and passion. 

We are proud to bring these incredible products to market in Singapore and beyond.

Name: PetCubes
Description: Founded in 2013, a Singaporean company, PetCubes has been a pioneer in the fresh pet food movement producing premium, human-grade meals for our pets. Formulated by renowned wildlife nutritionist Dr Francis Cabana and produced in our SFA approved facility, PetCubes’ ready-to-eat diets are both convenient and yet all-natural, complete meals that help your pet thrive by building a strong foundation from the inside. PetCubes diets are made with 100% Human-grade meat and is free from preservatives, fillers, additives and by-products. No cooking is required. Just thaw and serve.

Name: The Grateful Pet
Description:
The Grateful Pet is a Singapore based pet nutrition company that focuses on transformative Asian and Western superfoods for dogs and cats. The company champions the way for pet nutrition by providing innovative, wholesome and delicious nutritional products that are made without compromise from real food.

The Grateful Pet makes a difference in the community by donating a portion of each sale to Causes for Animals, an animal shelter in Singapore.

Feel free to reach out to us for enquiries at support@thegratefulpet.sg

Name: Nanyang Gum Benjmain MFG (PTE) LTD
Description:
Nanyang Gum Benjamin (MFG) Pte Ltd has accumulated more than 60 years of experience in the production and quality control of Gum Benjamin. Commonly known as Lobans or Gum Benzoin, this incense product is heavily used during cultural and religious practices by people of different background, with the aim of enhancing positive emotional energy. Nanyang Gum Benjamin believes in sourcing for the most suitable raw materials and processing of other gum products in line with our products. Over the years, we have exported our products to places across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, and the Americas. We manufacture different grades of Gum Benjamin, supplying them in bulk packaging, depending on the needs of the buyer. 

We firmly practice the philosophy of customer-orientation, and to support this principle, we have built a trustworthy network with deep product knowledge and strict quality control. Our emphasis on quality standards has, therefore, made us a reputable and long-term supplier for different client groups across different continents, as we ensure that our products meets the requirements of our client and the marketplace. Our flagship brands such as NGB-Cannon and NGB-Eye has achieved significant market presence in the incense industry. 

Nanyang Gum Benjamin has stood the test of time and overcome the challenges of the economy through constant improvement in our manufacturing process. Continuing the legacy of trust and excellence, Nanyang Gum Benjamin resonates with dedication and quality. We are honoured to have trustworthy suppliers and clients working with us. We look forward to exploring new opportunity for collaboration and partnership locally and internationally while upholding our values.

Name: NAFAY INTERNATIONAL (PRIVATE) LTD
Description: NAFAY INTERNATIONAL is a Singapore-based company dealing in the Agri-Food Business.

Name: GLOBAL VANTAGE INNOVATIVE GROUP PTE. LTD.
UE SERVICECORP SINGAPORE
Description: UE SERVICECORP SINGAPORE is a food production company based out of 12 Ang Mo Kio Street 64 #03A-13 UE BizHub Central, Singapore, Singapore.

Name: T1 United Group
Description:
T1 United Group was incorporated with the aim of being one of Asia’s leading gateways where different products and commodities pass seamlessly from its points of production to the points of demand. 

Our main goal is to strengthen market links between producers and customers with products they require, whenever and wherever they need them.

We source, store and deliver different products reliably and efficiently anywhere in the world, while also seeking to add value to the global trade with world-class service and performance throughout the whole supply chain.

Name: Highlanders International Pte Ltd
Description:
Highlanders International Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based health food company dedicated to promoting wellness through natural, nutrient-rich foods and beverages. Our mission is to make healthy living accessible, convenient, and enjoyable for everyone.

Our flagship product, Highlanders Brown Rice Tea, is crafted with care to deliver the perfect balance of taste and nutrition. Available at NTUC FairPrice and leading e-commerce platforms, our products combine traditional wisdom with modern health needs.

We are committed to quality, sustainability, and innovation, ensuring every product supports a healthier lifestyle without compromising on flavor.

Name: Equatorial Wines Pte Ltd
Description:
Equatorial Wines founder Mike Back started his career in the wine industry 22 years ago, gaining industry experience in wineries across Australia and Europe for 12 years before relocating to Singapore in 2010 and starting Equatorial Wines, this year celebrating its 11th birthday. 

In a crowded market Equatorial has established itself as a specialist importer of new world boutique, family owned producers, importing everything directly from the winery door.

We know the wines, we know the people, we know the vineyard dog… we have spent 10 years matching amazing wines to the cuisine, climate and drinking preferences of people living here in Singapore.
Our services include:

   -Tailored Corporate Wine Tastings & Events
   -Exclusive Rooftop Terrace
   -Venue Arrangement
   -Full Catering Service
   -Premium Wines, beers and spirits
   -Regular Winemaker Dinners & Masterclasses
   -Wine Education Classes

Name: 53 Degrees Asia Pacific
Description:
53 Degrees is a brand management company based in Singapore. We provide brand owner representation and full brand management services. Established in 2018, we are the appointed principle of Rong Tai He Maotai in Asia Pacific, Europe, Middle East and Africa. 

Committed to deliver high quality and authentic baijiu to the global market, our mission is to tell the true story of Maotai, its history and culture, one bottle at a time.

OUR STORY

The birth of 53 Degrees came about when a group of creative-minded entrepreneurs from diverse backgrounds in wine & spirits, business development and information technology joined forces in search of authentic baijiu in China. 

Their journey led them to Maotaizhen – home of the world’s most valuable spirit - where they had the honour and privilege to meet the 6th generation descendant and current brand owner of Rong Tai He to discover the true origin of Maotai.

OUR PARTNERSHIPS

Combining the heritage and tradition of baijiu with modern and new age trends, our plan is to increase the global footprint of Rong Tai He outside of China through strategic partnerships in the global travel retail market. 

Focusing mainly on key locations with high Mainland China traveler footfall, Rong Tai He has partnered with top travel retail distributor, Gebr. Heinemann and will be seen on the shelves of duty-free shops across Asia Pacific, Europe and Middle East in 2019.

Plans are already underway to collaborate with local domestic partners across the globe for ground activation and direct consumer experience to introduce cocktail versions of Rong Tai He as well as delectable food-pairing menus.

At 53 Degrees, innovation never stops. Message us at enquiries@rongtaihe.asia for more details.

Name: Interlift Sales Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1983, INTERLIFT SALES PTE LTD is a large-scale manufacturer of material handling equipment and systems. With a trusted and well-established of more than 40 years, we have been providing quality products and services to a highly diversified market. INTERLIFT is widely recognised in the industry to provide seamless integration of services for the full lifecycle of your equipment.

INTERLIFT offers a comprehensive range of material handling equipment including various kinds of hoists, overhead cranes, gantry cranes, slewing cranes, goods hoists, crane accessories and other automated systems.

Name: Ally Foods (Hi En LLP)
Description:
In 2006, Sun started Hi En LLP (Healthy Ingredients, Excellent Nutrition) to introduce healthier foods to the public. She imported healthier variations of pasta, olive oil and grain. She also supported food education through food exhibitions and promotional events at selected NTUC outlets. 

Today, the consistent support of loyal customers has allowed Sun to finally develop unique “ready-to-eat” products.

Household brand Ally’s product line is the result of Sun’s experience and passion in and for food. Her wish is for every person on this earth to eat well and be well.

Description:
Faust Innovations Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore based distribution channel focused on Asia and the Middle East.  Our company was founded by entrepreneurs and business leaders who have had environmental and healthy living concerns at the forefront of their thinking for the past 20 years.

Antimicrobial Technology:
Our business is the distribution of innovative products that can change the landscape of society. Products that offer a solution to the societal challenges that we face without causing harm to the world that future generations will inherit.  Products that ensure healthy living both now and in the future.
The products we distribute contain a patented Antimicrobial Plastic Additive (known as d2p AM) that protects against harmful microbes that thrive on the surface of plastic products and other human contact surfaces.
This Antimicrobial Plastic Additive has been tested and proven to create virus reduction of 99.9% in one hour, and are resistant to various forms of algae, bacteria, fungi (mildew, yeasts and moulds).
The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use—nitrile, latex), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc.

OXO Biodegradable Technology:
Certain of the products that we distribute are treated with the additive d2w, which is an oxo biodegradable additive included in the masterbatch production process of plastics manufacturing.  This masterbatch turns ordinary plastic, at the end of its useful life, into a material that readily degrades in the presence of oxygen and sunlight (UV light).
This material degrades in a continuous process that leaves no harmful residue, only carbon dioxide, water and biomass.The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc. Our d2w treated products include face masks, gloves, food packaging products.

HomeKong Mart specialises in HK goodies to share that feeling of HOME, bringing together everyone who loves the city. We aim to deliver the HK food, drinks and groceries you love and miss—right up to your doorstep when you’re unable to travel to HK yourself.

Name: Grasshopper Gastronomics Pte Ltd
Description:
At Grasshopper Gastronomics, we are redefining the future of food with sustainable, plant-based innovations. Founded in Singapore, our mission is to craft delicious, nutritious, and eco-friendly alternatives that inspire a shift toward ethical and healthier eating. We believe in creating a positive impact on both people and the planet through innovation and sustainability.

By offering plant-based solutions, we are also helping to slow down climate change, reducing the environmental footprint of traditional food systems. Together, we can build a greener and more sustainable future.

As the exclusive distributor for brands such as Ahmad Tea, Fulmer Honey, Buram Honey, Mlesna Tea, and our own Merlion Chocolate, we deliver quality products and reliable service across Southeast Asia.

Our business spans:

	•	Corporate and seasonal gifting solutions tailored for events and enterprises
	•	E-commerce fulfillment through Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop and other local platforms
	•	Cross-market brand representation bridging international brands with regional demand

With multilingual capabilities and an agile team, we focus on delivering efficient, responsive, and trustworthy service — from logistics to local market engagement.

Let’s connect and build something meaningful together.

Name: Fungry Pte Ltd
Description:
Fungry is a fresh service providing Buffet Restaurants listings, Dining Deals, and a Food Community Portal.

For diners, Fungry is trying to be a comprehensive buffet restaurant search portal and community, providing you with the latest restaurant information, buffet prices, updates and promotions, as well as the best buffet deals offered by them. It is also a food community where you can join as a member, take part in contests, polls, reviews and discussions to earn reward points which can then be used to redeem for products like restaurant vouchers or Fungry buffet deals. 

For restaurants, Fungry runs a dining platform which collaborates and lists all the buffet restaurants. Through our platform, Fungry helps you to run instantaneous promotions, advertisements and make improvements to your customer service through diners’ involvement in reviews and feedback. Fungry also provides a buffet deals cum loyalty programme, Fungry Deals, to help increase your restaurants sales.

For corporates, Fungry partners with you to offer 3 programmes: Bulk purchase, Reseller and Co-Branding. Use these F-Credits for your staff welfare, for your loyalty programmes or for your retail establishments.

Name: IWantVeggies
Description:
We've always had a special bond over our love for amazing food. Whether it was devouring mouthwatering dishes at family gatherings or exploring the vibrant food markets together, we believe in the power of fresh, wholesome ingredients and their ability to bring joy and nourishment to our lives.

We're not your average grocery store founders. We're just two regular people, driven by our passion for eating and sharing the goodness of fresh produce. When we embarked on this adventure, we wanted to create something truly special - a place where anyone, regardless of their background or circumstances, could have access to delicious and nutritious fruits, vegetables, and eggs.

We make sure that every item is hand-picked with love and care. We understand that not everyone can afford organic options, but that shouldn't mean compromising on quality. We've made it our mission to ensure that every piece of produce that reaches your doorstep is of the highest standard and bursting with flavor.

But our journey doesn't end there. One of the core values that drives us is compassion. We strongly believe in giving back to the community that has supported us on this amazing ride. That's why we offer free delivery to the sick, elderly, and disabled individuals in Singapore. We want to make sure that no one is left behind when it comes to accessing fresh and nutritious food. It's our small way of spreading love and nourishment to those who need it most.


Picture this: A grandmother unable to leave her home due to mobility issues, longing for the taste of a juicy, ripe mango. Or a young student recovering from an illness, yearning for a colorful array of vibrant veggies to regain strength. These stories, these real-life moments, are what fuel our passion to keep doing what we do.

We may be an online grocery store, but we're also your friends and neighbors. We want to be a part of your food journey, helping you make delici
